visual_name: N월 활동 퍼널 현황(활동 목표/ 활동 실적/활동진척률/기회전환률/기회목표/기회실적/기회진척률/계약전환률/계약목표/계약실적/계약진행률)
dax_expression:
1. act_mtd_(target)_v3 = TOTALMTD( CALCULATE(SUM('ktws FCT_CRM_TARGET_D'[target_cnt]), 
                                                FILTER('ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE', 'ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE'[tp_grp_1] in {"관계형성", "기회창출"})),'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
DECLARE @Year        INT           = 2026; DECLARE @MonthNumber INT           = 4; DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(100) = NULL; DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(100) = NULL; DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(100) = NULL; DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(100) = NULL; DECLARE @ActYn       NVARCHAR(10)  = NULL; DECLARE @Name        NVARCHAR(100) = NULL; DECLARE @CommonTpNm  NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- 슬라이서 DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm]

DECLARE @MonthStart DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   DATE = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);

SELECT
    d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name],
    aord.common_tp_nm,
    SUM(f.target_cnt) AS [act_mtd_target_v3]
FROM [ktws].[FCT_CRM_TARGET_D]            AS f
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]      AS c    ON f.daily_dt      = c.[Date]
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]       AS t    ON f.type_cd       = t.tp_key
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS aord ON t.common_tp_nm  = aord.common_tp_nm
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]           AS u    ON f.sc_key        = u.sc_key
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]         AS d    ON u.dealer_key    = d.dealer_key
WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')   -- 유형 필터
    AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
    AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
    -- 페이지 필터
    AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
    AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
    AND u.user_id NOT IN
        ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
    -- 슬라이서 (미선택 시 NULL → 전체)
    AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
    AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm       = @DealerNm)
    AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)
    AND (@DeptNm     IS NULL OR u.dept_nm         = @DeptNm)
    AND (@ActYn      IS NULL OR u.active_yn       = @ActYn)
    AND (@Name       IS NULL OR u.[name]          = @Name)
    AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)
GROUP BY d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
ORDER BY d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name], aord.common_tp_nm;

DECLARE @ActYn       NVARCHAR(10)  = NULL;

DECLARE @CommonTpNm  NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- 슬라이서 DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm]

    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]       AS t    ON f.tp_key        = t.tp_key

WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')   -- 유형 필터
    AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
    AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
    -- 페이지 필터
    AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)

    AND u.user_id NOT IN
        ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
    -- 슬라이서 (미선택 시 NULL → 전체)
    AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
    AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm       = @DealerNm)
    AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
DECLARE @Year        INT           = 2026;
DECLARE @MonthNumber INT           = 4;
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @ActYn       NVARCHAR(10)  = NULL;
DECLARE @Name        NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @CommonTpNm  NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- 슬라이서 DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm]
DECLARE @MonthStart DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   DATE = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);

;WITH
-- 분자: 1. act_mtd_(ac)_preOp — 활동 실적, DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE[tp_grp_1] 필터
act_actual AS (
    SELECT
        d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name],
        aord.common_tp_nm,
        SUM(f.actual_cnt) AS ac_cnt
    FROM [ktws].[FCT_ACTIVITY_v2]             AS f
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]      AS c    ON f.act_dt_fr     = c.[Date]
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]       AS t    ON f.tp_key        = t.tp_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS aord ON t.common_tp_nm  = aord.common_tp_nm
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]           AS u    ON f.sc_key        = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]         AS d    ON u.dealer_key    = d.dealer_key
    WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')          -- 분자: DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE
        AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
        AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
        AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
        AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
        AND u.user_id NOT IN
            ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
        AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
        AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm       = @DealerNm)
        AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)
        AND (@DeptNm     IS NULL OR u.dept_nm         = @DeptNm)
        AND (@ActYn      IS NULL OR u.active_yn       = @ActYn)
        AND (@Name       IS NULL OR u.[name]          = @Name)
        AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)
    GROUP BY d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
),
-- 분모: 1. act_mtd_(target)_preOp — 활동 목표, DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[tp_grp_1] 필터
act_target AS (
    SELECT
        d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name],
        aord.common_tp_nm,
        SUM(f.target_cnt) AS tgt_cnt
    FROM [ktws].[FCT_CRM_TARGET_D]            AS f
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]      AS c    ON f.daily_dt      = c.[Date]
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]       AS t    ON f.type_cd       = t.tp_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS aord ON t.common_tp_nm  = aord.common_tp_nm
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]           AS u    ON f.sc_key        = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]         AS d    ON u.dealer_key    = d.dealer_key
    WHERE aord.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')       -- 분모: DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER
        AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
        AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
        AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
        AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
        AND u.user_id NOT IN
            ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
        AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
        AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm       = @DealerNm)
        AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)
        AND (@DeptNm     IS NULL OR u.dept_nm         = @DeptNm)
        AND (@ActYn      IS NULL OR u.active_yn       = @ActYn)
        AND (@Name       IS NULL OR u.[name]          = @Name)
        AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)
    GROUP BY d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
)
-- 1. progress_act_mtd_preOp = DIVIDE(분자, 분모, 1)
SELECT
    COALESCE(aa.dealer_nm,    at2.dealer_nm)    AS dealer_nm,
    COALESCE(aa.group_name,   at2.group_name)   AS group_name,
    COALESCE(aa.dept_nm,      at2.dept_nm)      AS dept_nm,
    COALESCE(aa.[name],       at2.[name])       AS [name],
    COALESCE(aa.common_tp_nm, at2.common_tp_nm) AS common_tp_nm,
    CASE WHEN ISNULL(at2.tgt_cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 1.0
         ELSE CAST(ISNULL(aa.ac_cnt, 0) AS float) / at2.tgt_cnt
    END AS progress_act_mtd_preOp
FROM act_actual AS aa
    FULL OUTER JOIN act_target AS at2
        ON  aa.dealer_nm    = at2.dealer_nm
        AND aa.group_name   = at2.group_name
        AND aa.dept_nm      = at2.dept_nm
        AND aa.[name]       = at2.[name]
        AND aa.common_tp_nm = at2.common_tp_nm
ORDER BY dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, [name], common_tp_nm;

visual_name: N월 활동 퍼널 현황(활동 목표/ 활동 실적/활동진척률/기회전환률/기회목표/기회실적/기회진척률/계약전환률/계약목표/계약실적/계약진행률)
dax_expression: 8. cvr_lead/act_mtd = DIVIDE([2. lead_funnel_(mtd)_preOp],[1. act_mtd_(ac)_preOp], BLANK())

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
--DECLARE @Year        INT           = 2026;
--DECLARE @MonthNumber INT           = 4;
--DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
--DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
--DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
--DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
--DECLARE @ActYn       NVARCHAR(10)  = NULL;
--DECLARE @Name        NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
--
--DECLARE @MonthEnd DATE = EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1));

;WITH lead AS (   -- [2. lead_funnel_(mtd)_preOp]
    SELECT
        d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name], o.common_tp_nm,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.lead_key) AS lead_cnt
    FROM [ktws].[FCT_LEAD] AS l
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]      AS c ON l.lead_reg_dt = c.[Date]
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]       AS t ON l.tp_key      = t.tp_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS o ON t.common_tp_nm = o.common_tp_nm
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]           AS u ON l.cl_sc_key   = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]         AS d ON u.dealer_key  = d.dealer_key
--    WHERE c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
        AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
        -- 오픈 또는 판매 조건
--        AND ( l.close_dt > @MonthEnd
--              OR l.close_dt IS NULL
--              OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )
        -- 자격 활동을 가진 리드 (활동유형 필터는 여기 안에만)
        AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM [ktws].[FCT_ACTIVITY_v2]        AS a
                INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE] AS at2 ON a.tp_key = at2.tp_key
            WHERE a.lead_key = l.lead_key
                AND at2.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
                AND a.act_result <> N'부재중'
        )
        -- 페이지 필터
        AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
        AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
        -- 슬라이서 필터
--        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR u.BRAND      = @Brand)
--        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm  = @DealerNm)
--        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR u.group_name = @GroupName)
--        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR u.dept_nm    = @DeptNm)
--        AND (@ActYn     IS NULL OR u.act_yn     = @ActYn)
--        AND (@Name      IS NULL OR u.[name]     = @Name)
    GROUP BY d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name], o.common_tp_nm
),
ac AS (           -- [1. act_mtd_(ac)_preOp]
    SELECT
        d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name], o.common_tp_nm,
        SUM(f.actual_cnt) AS ac_cnt
    FROM [ktws].[FCT_ACTIVITY_v2] AS f
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]      AS c ON f.act_dt_fr = c.[Date]
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]       AS t ON f.tp_key    = t.tp_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS o ON t.common_tp_nm = o.common_tp_nm
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]           AS u ON f.sc_key    = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]         AS d ON u.dealer_key = d.dealer_key
    WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
--        AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
        AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
        AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
        AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
--        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR u.BRAND      = @Brand)
--        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm  = @DealerNm)
--        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR u.group_name = @GroupName)
--        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR u.dept_nm    = @DeptNm)
--        AND (@ActYn     IS NULL OR u.act_yn     = @ActYn)
--        AND (@Name      IS NULL OR u.[name]     = @Name)
    GROUP BY d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name], o.common_tp_nm
)
SELECT
    COALESCE(lead.dealer_nm,    ac.dealer_nm)    AS dealer_nm,
    COALESCE(lead.group_name,   ac.group_name)   AS group_name,
    COALESCE(lead.dept_nm,      ac.dept_nm)      AS dept_nm,
    COALESCE(lead.[name],       ac.[name])       AS [name],
    COALESCE(lead.common_tp_nm, ac.common_tp_nm) AS common_tp_nm,
    CASE
        WHEN ac.ac_cnt IS NULL OR ac.ac_cnt = 0 THEN NULL   -- DIVIDE(..., BLANK())
        ELSE CAST(ISNULL(lead.lead_cnt, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) / ac.ac_cnt
    END AS [cvr_lead_act_mtd]
FROM lead
    FULL OUTER JOIN ac
        ON  lead.dealer_nm    = ac.dealer_nm
        AND lead.group_name   = ac.group_name
        AND lead.dept_nm      = ac.dept_nm
        AND lead.[name]       = ac.[name]
        AND lead.common_tp_nm = ac.common_tp_nm
ORDER BY dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, [name], common_tp_nm;

dax_expression:
2. lead_funnel_(mtd_target_preOp) = 
CALCULATE(
    TOTALMTD(
        SUM('ktws FCT_CRM_TARGET_M'[target_cnt]),
        'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date]), FILTER('ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER', [tp_grp_1] in {"관계형성", "기회창출"}))

    aord.common_tp_nm,

WHERE lc.[Year] = @Year AND lc.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber   -- ★검증필요(MTD 하한)
    AND ( l.close_dt > @MonthEnd
       OR l.close_dt IS NULL

    AND u.user_id NOT IN
        ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
    -- 슬라이서 (미선택 시 NULL → 전체)
    AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)

DECLARE @Year        INT           = 2026;
DECLARE @MonthNumber INT           = 4;
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @ActYn       NVARCHAR(10)  = NULL;
DECLARE @Name        NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @CommonTpNm  NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- 슬라이서 DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm]

DECLARE @MonthStart DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   DATE = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);

;WITH
-- 분자: 2. lead_funnel_(mtd)_preOp — 자격 리드의 DISTINCT lead_key 카운트
lead_actual AS (
    SELECT
        d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name],
        aord.common_tp_nm,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.lead_key) AS lead_cnt
    FROM [ktws].[FCT_LEAD]                AS l
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]     AS lc  ON l.lead_reg_dt = lc.[Date]
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]          AS u   ON l.cl_sc_key   = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]        AS d   ON u.dealer_key  = d.dealer_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]      AS lct ON l.tp_key      = lct.tp_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS aord ON lct.common_tp_nm = aord.common_tp_nm
    WHERE lc.[Year] = @Year AND lc.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber   -- ★검증필요(MTD 하한)
        AND ( l.close_dt > @MonthEnd
           OR l.close_dt IS NULL
           OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )
        AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
        AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
        AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
        AND u.user_id NOT IN
            ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
        AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
        AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm       = @DealerNm)
        AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)
        AND (@DeptNm     IS NULL OR u.dept_nm         = @DeptNm)
        AND (@ActYn      IS NULL OR u.active_yn       = @ActYn)
        AND (@Name       IS NULL OR u.[name]          = @Name)
        AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)
        -- 자격 활동을 가진 리드
        AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM [ktws].[FCT_ACTIVITY_v2]        AS a
                INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE] AS act ON a.tp_key = act.tp_key
            WHERE a.lead_key = l.lead_key
                AND a.sc_key  = l.cl_sc_key           -- SC 컨텍스트 전파
                AND act.common_tp_nm = lct.common_tp_nm  -- 유형 컨텍스트 전파
                AND act.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
                AND ( a.act_result IS NULL OR a.act_result <> N'부재중' )
                AND a.act_dt_fr >= @MonthStart AND a.act_dt_fr <= @MonthEnd  -- ★검증필요(MTD)
        )
    GROUP BY d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
),
-- 분모: 2. lead_funnel_(mtd_target_preOp) — target_cnt 합계, tp_grp_1 IN (관계형성,기회창출)
lead_target AS (
    SELECT
        d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name],
        aord.common_tp_nm,
        SUM(f.target_cnt) AS tgt_cnt
    FROM [ktws].[FCT_CRM_TARGET_M]       AS f
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]     AS c ON f.monthly_dt = c.[Date]
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]      AS t ON f.tp_key     = t.tp_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS aord ON t.common_tp_nm = aord.common_tp_nm
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]          AS u ON f.sc_key     = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]        AS d ON u.dealer_key = d.dealer_key
    WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')   -- 분모 유형 필터
        AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
        AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
        AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
        AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
        AND u.user_id NOT IN
            ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
        AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
        AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm       = @DealerNm)
        AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)
        AND (@DeptNm     IS NULL OR u.dept_nm         = @DeptNm)
        AND (@ActYn      IS NULL OR u.active_yn       = @ActYn)
        AND (@Name       IS NULL OR u.[name]          = @Name)
        AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)
    GROUP BY d.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
)
-- 2. progress_lead_funnel_(mtd)_sc = DIVIDE(분자, 분모, 0)
SELECT
    COALESCE(la.dealer_nm,    lt.dealer_nm)    AS dealer_nm,
    COALESCE(la.group_name,   lt.group_name)   AS group_name,
    COALESCE(la.dept_nm,      lt.dept_nm)      AS dept_nm,
    COALESCE(la.[name],       lt.[name])       AS [name],
    COALESCE(la.common_tp_nm, lt.common_tp_nm) AS common_tp_nm,
    CASE WHEN ISNULL(lt.tgt_cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 0.0
         ELSE CAST(ISNULL(la.lead_cnt, 0) AS float) / lt.tgt_cnt
    END AS progress_lead_funnel_mtd_sc
FROM lead_actual AS la
    FULL OUTER JOIN lead_target AS lt
        ON  la.dealer_nm    = lt.dealer_nm
        AND la.group_name   = lt.group_name
        AND la.dept_nm      = lt.dept_nm
        AND la.[name]       = lt.[name]
        AND la.common_tp_nm = lt.common_tp_nm
ORDER BY dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, [name], common_tp_nm;

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
DECLARE @Year        int = 2026;      -- 슬라이서 DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber int = 4;      -- 슬라이서 DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
-- 선택형 슬라이서 (미선택이면 NULL로 두면 전체)
DECLARE @Brand      nvarchar(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm   nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName  nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm     nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActYn      nvarchar(10)  = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[act_yn]
DECLARE @UserName   nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @CommonTpNm nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- 슬라이서 DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm]

DECLARE @MonthStart date = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   date = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);

WITH
-- 공통: 페이지 필터 + 슬라이서를 통과한 사용자(SC)
elig_user AS (
    SELECT
        u.sc_key,
        dlr.dealer_nm,
        u.group_name,
        u.dept_nm,
        u.[name]
    FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        AS u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER AS dlr ON u.dealer_key = dlr.dealer_key
    WHERE ISNULL(u.facade_sc_yn, N'') <> N'창구SC'
      AND u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM')
      AND u.user_id NOT IN
          ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
      AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR u.BRAND       = @Brand)
      AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR dlr.dealer_nm  = @DealerNm)
      AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR u.group_name   = @GroupName)
      AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR u.dept_nm      = @DeptNm)
      AND (@ActYn     IS NULL OR u.active_yn    = @ActYn)
      AND (@UserName  IS NULL OR u.[name]       = @UserName)
),
-- 분모: 2. lead_funnel_(mtd)_preOp  →  자격 리드의 DISTINCT lead_key 카운트
lead_funnel AS (
    SELECT
        eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name],
        aord.common_tp_nm,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.lead_key) AS lead_cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD               AS l
    JOIN elig_user                   AS eu   ON l.cl_sc_key = eu.sc_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE       AS lct  ON l.tp_key    = lct.tp_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER AS aord ON lct.common_tp_nm = aord.common_tp_nm
    WHERE l.lead_reg_dt >= @MonthStart AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @MonthEnd  -- ★검증필요(MTD)
      AND ( l.close_dt > @MonthEnd
         OR l.close_dt IS NULL
         OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )
      AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)
      -- 자격 활동을 가진 리드
      AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS a
            JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS act ON a.tp_key = act.tp_key
            WHERE a.lead_key = l.lead_key
              AND a.sc_key   = l.cl_sc_key
              AND act.common_tp_nm = lct.common_tp_nm
              AND act.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
              AND ( a.act_result IS NULL OR a.act_result <> N'부재중' )
              AND a.lead_key IS NOT NULL
              AND a.act_dt_fr >= @MonthStart AND a.act_dt_fr <= @MonthEnd  -- ★검증필요(MTD)
      )
    GROUP BY eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
),
-- 분자: 3. cntrct_funnel_(mtd)  →  자격 리드에서 나온 계약 cnt 합계
cntrct_funnel AS (
    SELECT
        eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name],
        aord.common_tp_nm,
        SUM(c.cnt) AS cntrct_cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS       AS c
    JOIN elig_user                    AS eu   ON c.cn_sc_key = eu.sc_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE        AS ct   ON c.tp_key    = ct.tp_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER  AS aord ON ct.common_tp_nm = aord.common_tp_nm
    WHERE c.contract_dt >= @MonthStart AND c.contract_dt <= @MonthEnd
      AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)
      AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD          AS l
            JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE  AS lct ON l.tp_key = lct.tp_key
            WHERE l.lead_key   = c.lead_key
              AND l.cl_sc_key  = c.cn_sc_key
              AND lct.common_tp_nm = ct.common_tp_nm
              AND l.lead_reg_dt >= @MonthStart AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @MonthEnd  -- ★검증필요(MTD)
              AND ( l.close_dt > @MonthEnd
                 OR l.close_dt IS NULL
                 OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )
              AND EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS a
                    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS act ON a.tp_key = act.tp_key
                    WHERE a.lead_key = l.lead_key
                      AND a.sc_key   = c.cn_sc_key
                      AND act.common_tp_nm = ct.common_tp_nm
                      AND act.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
                      AND ( a.act_result IS NULL OR a.act_result <> N'부재중' )
                      AND a.lead_key IS NOT NULL
                      AND a.act_dt_fr >= @MonthStart AND a.act_dt_fr <= @MonthEnd  -- ★검증필요(MTD)
              )
      )
    GROUP BY eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
)
-- 8. cvr_cntrct/lead_mtd = DIVIDE(분자, 분모, BLANK())
SELECT
    COALESCE(cf.dealer_nm,  lf.dealer_nm)   AS dealer_nm,
    COALESCE(cf.group_name, lf.group_name)  AS group_name,
    COALESCE(cf.dept_nm,    lf.dept_nm)     AS dept_nm,
    COALESCE(cf.[name],     lf.[name])      AS [name],
    COALESCE(cf.common_tp_nm, lf.common_tp_nm) AS common_tp_nm,
    CASE WHEN ISNULL(lf.lead_cnt, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE CAST(cf.cntrct_cnt AS float) / lf.lead_cnt
    END AS cvr_cntrct_lead_mtd
FROM lead_funnel AS lf
FULL OUTER JOIN cntrct_funnel AS cf
    ON  lf.dealer_nm    = cf.dealer_nm
    AND lf.group_name   = cf.group_name
    AND lf.dept_nm      = cf.dept_nm
    AND lf.[name]       = cf.[name]
    AND lf.common_tp_nm = cf.common_tp_nm
ORDER BY dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, [name], common_tp_nm;

3. cntrct_funnel_(mtd) = 
var refdate = EOMONTH(MAX ( 'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date] ),0)
var val = 
TOTALMTD (
    CALCULATE (
        SUM ( 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cnt] ),
        'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[lead_key]
            IN
        CALCULATETABLE(
            DISTINCT( 'ktws FCT_LEAD'[lead_key]),
            'ktws FCT_LEAD'[close_dt] > refdate || ISBLANK ( 'ktws FCT_LEAD'[close_dt] ) || NOT ISBLANK( 'ktws FCT_LEAD'[last_retail_sales_dt] ),
            'ktws FCT_LEAD'[lead_key] 
                IN
            CALCULATETABLE (
                DISTINCT ( 'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[lead_key] ),
                FILTER (
                    'ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE',
                    'ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE'[tp_grp_1]
                        IN { "관계형성", "기회창출" }
                ),
                'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[act_result] <> "부재중",
                'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[lead_key] <> BLANK ()
            ))
    )
    ,
    'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date]
)

return val

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
DECLARE @Year        int = NULL;      -- 슬라이서 DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber int = NULL;         -- 슬라이서 DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
-- 선택형 슬라이서 (미선택이면 NULL로 두면 전체)
DECLARE @Brand      nvarchar(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm   nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName  nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm     nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActYn      nvarchar(10)  = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[act_yn]
DECLARE @UserName   nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @CommonTpNm nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- 슬라이서 DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm]

DECLARE @MonthStart date = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   date = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);   -- = refdate = MTD 종료일(월 전체 선택 기준)

SELECT
    dlr.dealer_nm,
    u.group_name,
    u.dept_nm,
    u.[name],
    aord.common_tp_nm,
    SUM(c.cnt) AS cntrct_funnel_mtd
FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS           AS c
JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER                AS u    ON c.cn_sc_key   = u.sc_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER         AS dlr  ON u.dealer_key  = dlr.dealer_key
JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE            AS ct   ON c.tp_key      = ct.tp_key
JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER      AS aord ON ct.common_tp_nm = aord.common_tp_nm
WHERE
    -- 계약일 MTD 범위 (contract_dt → DIM_CALENDAR 관계)
    c.contract_dt >= @MonthStart AND c.contract_dt <= @MonthEnd
    -- 자격 있는 리드에 lead_key가 포함되어야 함
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD          AS l
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE  AS lct ON l.tp_key = lct.tp_key
        WHERE l.lead_key   = c.lead_key
          AND l.cl_sc_key  = c.cn_sc_key          -- 동일 SC 컨텍스트 전파
          AND lct.common_tp_nm = ct.common_tp_nm  -- 동일 유형(common_tp_nm) 전파
          AND l.lead_reg_dt >= @MonthStart AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @MonthEnd  -- ★검증필요
          AND ( l.close_dt > @MonthEnd            -- 월말 이후 마감
             OR l.close_dt IS NULL                -- 미마감
             OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )  -- 리테일 판매 존재
          -- 자격 있는 활동을 가진 리드
          AND EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS a
                JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS act ON a.tp_key = act.tp_key
                WHERE a.lead_key = l.lead_key
                  AND a.sc_key   = c.cn_sc_key            -- 동일 SC 컨텍스트 전파
                  AND act.common_tp_nm = ct.common_tp_nm  -- 동일 유형 전파
                  AND act.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
                  AND ( a.act_result IS NULL OR a.act_result <> N'부재중' )  -- DAX blank 포함
                  AND a.lead_key IS NOT NULL
                  AND a.act_dt_fr >= @MonthStart AND a.act_dt_fr <= @MonthEnd  -- ★검증필요
          )
    )
    -- 페이지 필터
    AND ISNULL(u.facade_sc_yn, N'') <> N'창구SC'
    AND u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM')
    AND u.user_id NOT IN
        ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
    -- 슬라이서 (미선택 시 NULL → 전체)
    AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
    AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR dlr.dealer_nm     = @DealerNm)
    AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)
    AND (@DeptNm     IS NULL OR u.dept_nm         = @DeptNm)
    AND (@ActYn      IS NULL OR u.active_yn       = @ActYn)
    AND (@UserName   IS NULL OR u.[name]          = @UserName)
    AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)
GROUP BY
    dlr.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
ORDER BY
    dlr.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name], aord.common_tp_nm;

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
DECLARE @Year        int = 2026;      -- 슬라이서 DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber int = 4;      -- 슬라이서 DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
-- 선택형 슬라이서 (미선택이면 NULL로 두면 전체)
DECLARE @Brand      nvarchar(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm   nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName  nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm     nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActYn      nvarchar(10)  = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[act_yn]
DECLARE @UserName   nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @CommonTpNm nvarchar(200) = NULL;   -- 슬라이서 DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm]

DECLARE @MonthStart date = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   date = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);

WITH
-- 페이지 필터 + 슬라이서를 통과한 사용자(SC)
elig_user AS (
    SELECT
        u.sc_key,
        dlr.dealer_nm,
        u.group_name,
        u.dept_nm,
        u.[name]
    FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        AS u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER AS dlr ON u.dealer_key = dlr.dealer_key
    WHERE ISNULL(u.facade_sc_yn, N'') <> N'창구SC'
      AND u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM')
      AND u.user_id NOT IN
          ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
      AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR u.BRAND       = @Brand)
      AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR dlr.dealer_nm  = @DealerNm)
      AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR u.group_name   = @GroupName)
      AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR u.dept_nm      = @DeptNm)
      AND (@ActYn     IS NULL OR u.active_yn    = @ActYn)
      AND (@UserName  IS NULL OR u.[name]       = @UserName)
),
-- 분자(실적): 3. cntrct_funnel_(mtd) — SC 소계 레벨로 집계 (common_tp_nm 무시)
cntrct_funnel AS (
    SELECT
        eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name],
        SUM(c.cnt) AS cntrct_cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS       AS c
    JOIN elig_user                    AS eu ON c.cn_sc_key = eu.sc_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE        AS ct ON c.tp_key    = ct.tp_key
    WHERE c.contract_dt >= @MonthStart AND c.contract_dt <= @MonthEnd
      AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD          AS l
            JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE  AS lct ON l.tp_key = lct.tp_key
            WHERE l.lead_key   = c.lead_key
              AND l.cl_sc_key  = c.cn_sc_key
              AND lct.common_tp_nm = ct.common_tp_nm
              AND l.lead_reg_dt >= @MonthStart AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @MonthEnd  -- ★검증필요(MTD)
              AND ( l.close_dt > @MonthEnd
                 OR l.close_dt IS NULL
                 OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )
              AND EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS a
                    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS act ON a.tp_key = act.tp_key
                    WHERE a.lead_key = l.lead_key
                      AND a.sc_key   = c.cn_sc_key
                      AND act.common_tp_nm = ct.common_tp_nm
                      AND act.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
                      AND ( a.act_result IS NULL OR a.act_result <> N'부재중' )
                      AND a.lead_key IS NOT NULL
                      AND a.act_dt_fr >= @MonthStart AND a.act_dt_fr <= @MonthEnd  -- ★검증필요(MTD)
              )
      )
    GROUP BY eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name]
),
-- 분모(목표): 3. cntrct_funnel_(mtd_target)_sc/cond
--   ALL('DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE') + common_tp_nm='계약' → 유형 컨텍스트 무시, '계약' 목표만
tgt AS (
    SELECT
        eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name],
        SUM(t.target_cnt) AS target_cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M       AS t
    JOIN elig_user                   AS eu  ON t.sc_key  = eu.sc_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE       AS tct ON t.tp_key  = tct.tp_key
    WHERE t.monthly_dt >= @MonthStart AND t.monthly_dt <= @MonthEnd
      AND tct.common_tp_nm = N'계약'   -- ALL 무시 후 '계약'만
    GROUP BY eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name]
)
-- 최종: SC 소계 레벨에서만 값 (ISINSCOPE(common_tp_nm)=FALSE 에 해당)
--   DIVIDE(분자, 분모, 1) : 분모 0/NULL 이면 1
SELECT
    COALESCE(cf.dealer_nm,  t.dealer_nm)  AS dealer_nm,
    COALESCE(cf.group_name, t.group_name) AS group_name,
    COALESCE(cf.dept_nm,    t.dept_nm)    AS dept_nm,
    COALESCE(cf.[name],     t.[name])     AS [name],
    CASE WHEN ISNULL(t.target_cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 1.0
         ELSE CAST(ISNULL(cf.cntrct_cnt, 0) AS float) / t.target_cnt
    END AS progress_cntrct_funnel_mtd_sc_cond
FROM tgt AS t
FULL OUTER JOIN cntrct_funnel AS cf
    ON  t.dealer_nm  = cf.dealer_nm
    AND t.group_name = cf.group_name
    AND t.dept_nm    = cf.dept_nm
    AND t.[name]     = cf.[name]
ORDER BY dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, [name];

source.visual_name: N월 활동 퍼널 현황(활동 목표/ 활동 실적/활동진척률/기회전환률/기회목표/기회실적/기회진척률/계약전환률/계약목표/계약실적/계약진행률)

dax_expression: progress_working_day = DIVIDE([count_working_day_pass], [count_working_day_total], 0)

count_working_day_pass = CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'),
    FILTER(
        'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS',
        'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date] <= TODAY()
            && 'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[kr_holiday] = "0"
    )
)
count_working_day_total = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'), 'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[kr_holiday] = "0")

1. act_mtd_(ac)_preOp = 
TOTALMTD(
    CALCULATE(SUM('ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[actual_cnt]),
        FILTER('ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE', 'ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE'[tp_grp_1] in {"관계형성", "기회창출"})),
    'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])

1. act_mtd_(target)_preOp = TOTALMTD(CALCULATE(SUM('ktws FCT_CRM_TARGET_D'[target_cnt]), FILTER('ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER', 'ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER'[tp_grp_1] in {"관계형성", "기회창출"})),'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])
1. progress_act_mtd_preOp = DIVIDE([1. act_mtd_(ac)_preOp], [1. act_mtd_(target)_preOp], 1)
8. cvr_lead/act_mtd = DIVIDE([2. lead_funnel_(mtd)_preOp],[1. act_mtd_(ac)_preOp], BLANK())

2. lead_funnel_(mtd)_preOp = 
TOTALMTD(
CALCULATE (
    DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'ktws FCT_LEAD'[lead_key] ),

    KEEPFILTERS (
        'ktws FCT_LEAD'[lead_key]
            IN
            CALCULATETABLE (
                DISTINCT ( 'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[lead_key] ),
                FILTER (
                    'ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE',
                    'ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE'[tp_grp_1]
                        IN { "관계형성", "기회창출" }
                ),
                'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[act_result] <> "부재중"
            )
    ),

    'ktws FCT_LEAD'[close_dt] > EOMONTH ( MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date] ), 0)
        || ISBLANK ( 'ktws FCT_LEAD'[close_dt] ) || NOT ISBLANK( 'ktws FCT_LEAD'[last_retail_sales_dt] ) // 26.03.31(수정) 조건 추가
), 'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])

2. lead_funnel_(mtd_target_preOp) = 
CALCULATE(
    TOTALMTD(
        SUM('ktws FCT_CRM_TARGET_M'[target_cnt]),
        'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date]), FILTER('ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER', [tp_grp_1] in {"관계형성", "기회창출"}))
2. progress_lead_mtd_sc = DIVIDE([2. lead_funnel_(mtd)_preOp], [2. lead_funnel_(mtd_target_preOp)],1)
8. cvr_td/lead_mtd = DIVIDE([2-1. td_funnel_(mtd_preOp)_leadMatch], [2. lead_funnel_(mtd)_preOp], 0)

2-1. td_funnel_(mtd_preOp)_leadMatch = 
VAR ref_date =  EOMONTH( MAX( 'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date] ), 0 )
var act_grp =
CALCULATETABLE (
        DISTINCT ( 'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[lead_key] ),
        FILTER (
            'ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE',
            'ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE'[tp_grp_1] IN { "관계형성", "기회창출" }
        ),
        'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[act_result] <> "부재중",
        'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[contact_tp] <> "MSG",
        NOT ISBLANK ( 'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[lead_key] )
    )

var lead_grp = 
    CALCULATETABLE (
        DISTINCT ( 'ktws FCT_LEAD'[lead_key] ),
        'ktws FCT_LEAD'[close_dt] > ref_date
            || ISBLANK ( 'ktws FCT_LEAD'[close_dt] ) || NOT ISBLANK( 'ktws FCT_LEAD'[last_retail_sales_dt] ),
        KEEPFILTERS (
            'ktws FCT_LEAD'[lead_key]
                IN act_grp
        )
    )

VAR val = 
TOTALMTD (
    CALCULATE (
        DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[lead_key] ),
        ALL('ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE'),
        'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[act_tp] = "P113",
        'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[act_result] = "시승완료",
        KEEPFILTERS (
            'ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[lead_key]
                IN lead_grp
        )
    ),
    'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date]
)


return val

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        VARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       VARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    VARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        VARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       VARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50) = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50) = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50) = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    VARCHAR(500) = 'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. MTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 상한 없음 → 각 월 전체 합계)
      진행 중인 월을 오늘까지만 집계하려면 GETDATE() 지정
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   3. cntrct_mtd_(ac)
   = TOTALMTD( SUM(cnt) FILTER cancel_dt IS NULL, Calendar[Date] )
   MonthName 행 기준 → 월별 누적(= 월 합계, @AsOfDate 상한 적용)
   ============================================ */
SELECT
      C.MonthName
    , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NULL THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS N'실적'
FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        C   ON F.contract_dt   = C.[Date]
JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER             U   ON F.cn_sc_key     = U.sc_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key    = D.dealer_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key  = S.spec_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key       = V.var_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key     = M.mdl_key
WHERE 1 = 1
    /* ---- MTD 상한 ---- */
    AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR C.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

    /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER) ---- */
    AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + '%')
    AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclScName1 + '%'
                        AND U.name NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclScName2 + '%'))
    AND U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ','))

    /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
    AND (@Year      IS NULL OR C.[Year]     IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
    AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
    AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
    AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
    AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
    AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
    AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
    AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
    AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
    AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
GROUP BY
      C.MonthName
order by C.MonthName

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분)
      ※ 한글 값 지원을 위해 NVARCHAR + N'...' 사용
      예: DECLARE @DeptNm NVARCHAR(500) = N'렉서스 강남,렉서스 강북,렉서스 강서';
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. MTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 전체 합계)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   MonthName | 실적 | 취소 | 타겟 | 달성률
   ============================================ */
SELECT
      C.MonthName
    , ISNULL(CN.ac_val, 0)        AS N'실적'
    , ISNULL(CN.cancel_val, 0)    AS N'취소'
    , ISNULL(TGT.val, 0)          AS N'타겟'
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(CN.total_val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TGT.val
      END                         AS N'달성률'
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT MonthName
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR [Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
) C
/* ---------- 계약 팩트: 실적 / 취소 / 달성률 분자 ---------- */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NULL     THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS ac_val      -- 실적
        , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS cancel_val  -- 취소
        , SUM(F.cnt)                                                   AS total_val   -- 달성률 분자
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt  = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) CN ON C.MonthName = CN.MonthName
/* ---------- 목표 팩트: 타겟 (FCT_CRM_TARGET_M, '계약') ---------- */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS val
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.common_tp_nm = N'계약'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) TGT ON C.MonthName = TGT.MonthName
ORDER BY C.MonthName;

DECLARE @Year        VARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       VARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    VARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        VARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       VARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50) = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50) = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50) = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    VARCHAR(500) = 'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. MTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 상한 없음 → 각 월 전체 합계)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   3. cntrct_mtd_(canceled)_v2
   = TOTALMTD( SUM(cnt) FILTER cancel_dt IS NOT NULL, Calendar[Date] )
   해당 월 계약 건 중 취소된 건 (계약일 기준 월 집계)
   ============================================ */
SELECT
      C.MonthName
    , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS N'취소'
FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        C   ON F.contract_dt   = C.[Date]
JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER             U   ON F.cn_sc_key     = U.sc_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key    = D.dealer_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key  = S.spec_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key       = V.var_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key     = M.mdl_key
WHERE 1 = 1
    /* ---- MTD 상한 ---- */
    AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR C.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

    /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER) ---- */
    AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + '%')
    AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclScName1 + '%'
                        AND U.name NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclScName2 + '%'))
    AND U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ','))

    /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
    AND (@Year      IS NULL OR C.[Year]     IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
    AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
    AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
    AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
    AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
    AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
    AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
    AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
    AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
    AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
GROUP BY
      C.MonthName
ORDER BY
      C.MonthName;

        , SUM(F.cnt)                                                   AS total_val   -- 달성률 분자
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt  = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) CN ON C.MonthName = CN.MonthName
/* ---------- 목표 팩트: 타겟 (FCT_CRM_TARGET_M, '계약') ---------- */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS val
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.common_tp_nm = N'계약'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) TGT ON C.MonthName = TGT.MonthName
ORDER BY C.MonthName;

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        VARCHAR(200) = '2026';  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       VARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    VARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   VARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        VARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       VARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50) = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50) = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50) = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    VARCHAR(500) = 'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. MTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 전체 합계)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;

/* ============================================
   3. cntrct_mtd_(target)_cond
   -----------------------------------------------
   ※ 페이지 필터가 DIM_MNG_USER[name]에 직접 걸려 있어
     ISFILTERED(name) = 항상 TRUE
     → 이 페이지에서는 항상 [3. cntrct_funnel_(mtd_target)_sc]
       (FCT_CRM_TARGET_M, common_tp_nm='계약') 분기만 실행됨
   → COALESCE(val,0) 은 월 목록 LEFT JOIN + ISNULL 로 재현
   ============================================ */
SELECT
      C.MonthName
    , ISNULL(T.val, 0) AS [cntrct_mtd_(target)_cond]
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT MonthName
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR [Year] IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
) C
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS N'타겟'
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.common_tp_nm = N'계약'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + '%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclScName1 + '%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclScName2 + '%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) T ON C.MonthName = T.MonthName
ORDER BY C.MonthName;

      예: DECLARE @DeptNm NVARCHAR(500) = N'렉서스 강남,렉서스 강북,렉서스 강서';

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수

DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';

DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. MTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 전체 합계)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   MonthName | 실적 | 취소 | 타겟 | 달성률
   ============================================ */
SELECT
      C.MonthName
    , ISNULL(CN.ac_val, 0)        AS N'실적'
    , ISNULL(CN.cancel_val, 0)    AS N'취소'
    , ISNULL(TGT.val, 0)          AS N'타겟'
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(CN.total_val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TGT.val
      END                         AS N'달성률'
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT MonthName
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR [Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
) C
/* ---------- 계약 팩트: 실적 / 취소 / 달성률 분자 ---------- */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NULL     THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS ac_val      -- 실적
        , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS cancel_val  -- 취소
        , SUM(F.cnt)                                                   AS total_val   -- 달성률 분자
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F

    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'

        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))

        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName

/* ---------- 목표 팩트: 타겟 (FCT_CRM_TARGET_M, '계약') ---------- */
LEFT JOIN (

DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;

/* ============================================
   3. progress_cntrct_mtd_cond
   = DIVIDE( [cntrct_mtd_coalesce], [cntrct_mtd_(target)_cond], 0 )

   - 분모: FCT_CRM_TARGET_M SUM(target_cnt), common_tp_nm='계약'

   ============================================ */
SELECT
      C.MonthName
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(ACT.val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TGT.val
      END AS [progress_cntrct_mtd_cond]
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT MonthName
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR [Year] IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))

          CAL.MonthName

        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + '%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclScName1 + '%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclScName2 + '%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) ACT ON C.MonthName = ACT.MonthName
/* ---------- 분모: cntrct_mtd_(target)_cond (항상 SC 분기) ---------- */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS N'달성률'
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.common_tp_nm = N'계약'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + '%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclScName1 + '%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE '%' + @ExclScName2 + '%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) TGT ON C.MonthName = TGT.MonthName
ORDER BY C.MonthName;

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분)
      ※ 한글 값 지원을 위해 NVARCHAR + N'...' 사용
      예: DECLARE @DeptNm NVARCHAR(500) = N'렉서스 강남,렉서스 강북,렉서스 강서';
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. MTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 전체 합계)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   MonthName | 실적 | 취소 | 타겟 | 달성률
   ============================================ */
SELECT
      C.MonthName
    , ISNULL(CN.ac_val, 0)        AS N'실적'
    , ISNULL(CN.cancel_val, 0)    AS N'취소'
    , ISNULL(TGT.val, 0)          AS N'타겟'
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(CN.total_val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TGT.val
      END                         AS N'달성률'
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT MonthName
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR [Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
) C
/* ---------- 계약 팩트: 실적 / 취소 / 달성률 분자 ---------- */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NULL     THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS ac_val      -- 실적
        , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS cancel_val  -- 취소
        , SUM(F.cnt)                                                   AS total_val   -- 달성률 분자
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt  = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) CN ON C.MonthName = CN.MonthName
/* ---------- 목표 팩트: 타겟 (FCT_CRM_TARGET_M, '계약') ---------- */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS val
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.common_tp_nm = N'계약'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) TGT ON C.MonthName = TGT.MonthName
ORDER BY C.MonthName;

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. YTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 말까지 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   3. cntrct_ytd_(ac)
   = TOTALYTD( SUM(cnt),
       cancel_dt > 해당 월 말 OR cancel_dt IS NULL )
   → 월 앵커별로: 계약일 ∈ [연초, 월말] AND
                  (월말 시점 미취소: cancel_dt IS NULL OR cancel_dt > 월말)
   ============================================ */
;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
    /* 월 앵커: 연도별 각 월의 월말 날짜 (@AsOfDate 상한 적용) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]                                           AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                      AS year_start
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
               THEN @AsOfDate
               ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]))
          END                                                  AS month_end
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate OR MONTH(CAL.[Date]) = MONTH(@AsOfDate))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
SELECT
      A.MonthAbbr
    , ISNULL(SUM(T.val), 0) AS [cntrct_ytd_(ac)]
FROM MonthAnchor A
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT SUM(F.cnt) AS val
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt  = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        /* ---- YTD 누적 범위: 연초 ~ 해당 월말 ---- */
        AND CAL.[Date] >= A.year_start
        AND CAL.[Date] <= A.month_end

        /* ---- 월말 시점 미취소 조건 ---- */
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.month_end)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
) T
GROUP BY A.MonthAbbr
ORDER BY A.MonthAbbr;

;WITH MonthAnchor AS (

          CAL.[Year]                                           AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                      AS year_start
        , MIN(CAL.[Date])                                      AS month_start
