        AND A.tp_nm = N'계약'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, TargetYtd AS (
    SELECT
          MA.yr
        , MA.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(ISNULL(MT.mval, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY MA.yr ORDER BY MA.month_start
                                        ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS tgt_ytd
    FROM MonthAnchor MA
    LEFT JOIN MonthlyTarget MT
           ON MA.yr = MT.yr AND MA.MonthAbbr = MT.MonthAbbr
)
SELECT
      A.MonthAbbr
    , ISNULL(SUM(CN.ac_val), 0)      AS N'실적'
    , ISNULL(SUM(CN.cancel_val), 0)  AS N'취소'
    , ISNULL(SUM(TY.tgt_ytd), 0)     AS N'타겟'
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(TY.tgt_ytd), 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(SUM(CN.total_val), 0) AS FLOAT) / SUM(TY.tgt_ytd)
      END                            AS N'달성률'
FROM MonthAnchor A
/* ---------- 계약 팩트: 실적 / 취소 / 달성률 분자 (월 앵커별 재평가) ----------
   ※ 8124 오류 회피: 외부 참조(A.month_end) 비교는 내부 파생 테이블 X에서
     행 단위로 먼저 계산하고, 집계는 X의 컬럼만으로 수행                    */
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT
          SUM(X.ac_cnt)     AS ac_val      -- 실적 (월말 시점 미취소)
        , SUM(X.cancel_cnt) AS cancel_val  -- 취소 (월말 시점 기취소)
        , SUM(X.cnt)        AS total_val   -- 달성률 분자 (취소 무관)
    FROM (
        SELECT
              F.cnt
            , CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NULL
                     OR F.cancel_dt > A.month_end
                   THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END AS ac_cnt
            , CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL
                    AND F.cancel_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, A.month_end)
                   THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END AS cancel_cnt
        FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt  = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            /* ---- YTD 누적 범위: 연초 ~ 해당 월말 ---- */
            AND CAL.[Date] >= A.year_start
            AND CAL.[Date] <= A.month_end

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    ) X
) CN
/* ---------- 타겟 YTD 누적 ---------- */
LEFT JOIN TargetYtd TY
       ON A.yr = TY.yr AND A.MonthAbbr = TY.MonthAbbr
GROUP BY A.MonthAbbr
ORDER BY A.MonthAbbr;

dax_expression:
3. cntrct_ytd_(canceled) = 
VAR cal = TOTALYTD(CALCULATE(
    SUM('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cnt]) 
        , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt] <> BLANK()
        , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt] < EOMONTH(MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date]),0) +1) -- 취소일자가 비거나, max월 말 이후 발생한 경우
    ,'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])
RETURN COALESCE(cal,0)

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = '2026';  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. YTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 말까지 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   3. cntrct_ytd_(canceled)
   = TOTALYTD( SUM(cnt),
       cancel_dt IS NOT NULL AND cancel_dt < 월말+1일 (= <= 월말) )
   → 월 앵커별로: 계약일 ∈ [연초, 월말] AND
                  월말 시점에 이미 취소된 건 (cancel_dt <= 월말)
   COALESCE(cal,0) → 없는 월은 0
   ============================================ */
;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]                                           AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                      AS year_start
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
               THEN @AsOfDate
               ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]))
          END                                                  AS month_end
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate OR MONTH(CAL.[Date]) = MONTH(@AsOfDate))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
SELECT
      A.MonthAbbr
    , ISNULL(SUM(T.val), 0) AS [cntrct_ytd_(canceled)]
FROM MonthAnchor A
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT SUM(F.cnt) AS val
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt  = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        /* ---- YTD 누적 범위: 연초 ~ 해당 월말 ---- */
        AND CAL.[Date] >= A.year_start
        AND CAL.[Date] <= A.month_end

        /* ---- 월말 시점 기취소 조건 (cancel_dt < 월말+1 = <= 월말) ---- */
        AND F.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL
        AND F.cancel_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, A.month_end)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
) T
GROUP BY A.MonthAbbr
ORDER BY A.MonthAbbr;

            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    ) X
) CN
/* ---------- 타겟 YTD 누적 ---------- */
LEFT JOIN TargetYtd TY
       ON A.yr = TY.yr AND A.MonthAbbr = TY.MonthAbbr
GROUP BY A.MonthAbbr
ORDER BY A.MonthAbbr;

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = '2026';  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. YTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   3. cntrct_ytd_(target)_cond
   -----------------------------------------------
   ※ 페이지 필터가 DIM_MNG_USER[name]에 직접 걸려 있어
     ISFILTERED(name) = 항상 TRUE
     → 항상 [3. cntrct_ytd_(target)_sc] 분기
       (FCT_CRM_TARGET_M, DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE[tp_nm]='계약' ← common_tp_nm 아님!)
   → TOTALYTD = 연도 내 1월부터 해당 월까지 누적
   → COALESCE(cal,0) = 월 목록 LEFT JOIN + ISNULL
   ============================================ */
;WITH MonthList AS (
    /* 월 목록: 연도 × 월 (누적 순서 보장을 위해 월 번호 = 월초 날짜 사용) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]                       AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , MIN(CAL.[Date])                  AS month_start
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, MonthlyTarget AS (
    /* 월별 목표 합계 */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]        AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS mval
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.tp_nm = N'계약'          -- ※ common_tp_nm 아님 (DAX 원문 기준)
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
SELECT
      ML.MonthAbbr
    , ISNULL(SUM(YTD.ytd_val), 0) AS [cntrct_ytd_(target)_cond]
FROM MonthList ML
LEFT JOIN (
    /* 연도 내 누적 (TOTALYTD) */
    SELECT
          ML2.yr
        , ML2.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(ISNULL(MT.mval, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY ML2.yr ORDER BY ML2.month_start
                                        ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS ytd_val
    FROM MonthList ML2
    LEFT JOIN MonthlyTarget MT
           ON ML2.yr = MT.yr AND ML2.MonthAbbr = MT.MonthAbbr
) YTD ON ML.yr = YTD.yr AND ML.MonthAbbr = YTD.MonthAbbr
GROUP BY ML.MonthAbbr
ORDER BY ML.MonthAbbr;

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. YTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 말까지 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   MonthAbbr | 실적 | 취소 | 타겟 | 달성률
   ============================================ */
;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]                                           AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                      AS year_start
        , MIN(CAL.[Date])                                      AS month_start
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
               THEN @AsOfDate
               ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]))
          END                                                  AS month_end
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate OR MONTH(CAL.[Date]) = MONTH(@AsOfDate))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, MonthlyTarget AS (
    /* 타겟: 월별 목표 합계 (tp_nm='계약') */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]        AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS mval
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.tp_nm = N'계약'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, TargetYtd AS (
    SELECT
          MA.yr
        , MA.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(ISNULL(MT.mval, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY MA.yr ORDER BY MA.month_start
                                        ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS tgt_ytd
    FROM MonthAnchor MA
    LEFT JOIN MonthlyTarget MT
           ON MA.yr = MT.yr AND MA.MonthAbbr = MT.MonthAbbr
)
SELECT
      A.MonthAbbr
    , ISNULL(SUM(CN.ac_val), 0)      AS N'실적'
    , ISNULL(SUM(CN.cancel_val), 0)  AS N'취소'
    , ISNULL(SUM(TY.tgt_ytd), 0)     AS N'타겟'
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(TY.tgt_ytd), 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(SUM(CN.total_val), 0) AS FLOAT) / SUM(TY.tgt_ytd)
      END                            AS N'달성률'
FROM MonthAnchor A
/* ---------- 계약 팩트: 실적 / 취소 / 달성률 분자 (월 앵커별 재평가) ----------
   ※ 8124 오류 회피: 외부 참조(A.month_end) 비교는 내부 파생 테이블 X에서
     행 단위로 먼저 계산하고, 집계는 X의 컬럼만으로 수행                    */
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT
          SUM(X.ac_cnt)     AS ac_val      -- 실적 (월말 시점 미취소)
        , SUM(X.cancel_cnt) AS cancel_val  -- 취소 (월말 시점 기취소)
        , SUM(X.cnt)        AS total_val   -- 달성률 분자 (취소 무관)
    FROM (
        SELECT
              F.cnt
            , CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NULL
                     OR F.cancel_dt > A.month_end
                   THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END AS ac_cnt
            , CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL
                    AND F.cancel_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, A.month_end)
                   THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END AS cancel_cnt
        FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt  = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            /* ---- YTD 누적 범위: 연초 ~ 해당 월말 ---- */
            AND CAL.[Date] >= A.year_start
            AND CAL.[Date] <= A.month_end

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    ) X
) CN
/* ---------- 타겟 YTD 누적 ---------- */
LEFT JOIN TargetYtd TY
       ON A.yr = TY.yr AND A.MonthAbbr = TY.MonthAbbr
GROUP BY A.MonthAbbr
ORDER BY A.MonthAbbr;

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. YTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   3. progress_cntrct_ytd_cond
   = DIVIDE( [cntrct_ytd], [cntrct_ytd_(target)_cond], 0 )
   - 분자: FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS SUM(cnt) YTD 누적  ※ 취소 필터 없음
   - 분모: FCT_CRM_TARGET_M SUM(target_cnt) YTD 누적, tp_nm='계약'
           (페이지 필터로 ISFILTERED(name)=TRUE → 항상 SC 분기)
   ============================================ */
;WITH MonthList AS (
    /* 월 목록: 연도 × 월 */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]      AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , MIN(CAL.[Date]) AS month_start
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, MonthlyContract AS (
    /* 분자: 월별 계약 합계 (취소 필터 없음) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]  AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(F.cnt)  AS mval
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt  = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, MonthlyTarget AS (
    /* 분모: 월별 목표 합계 (tp_nm='계약') */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]        AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS mval
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.tp_nm = N'계약'          -- ※ YTD 목표는 tp_nm 기준 (DAX 원문)
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, Cumulated AS (
    /* 연도 내 누적 (TOTALYTD 재현) */
    SELECT
          ML.yr
        , ML.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(ISNULL(MC.mval, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY ML.yr ORDER BY ML.month_start
                                        ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS act_ytd
        , SUM(ISNULL(MT.mval, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY ML.yr ORDER BY ML.month_start
                                        ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS tgt_ytd
    FROM MonthList ML
    LEFT JOIN MonthlyContract MC ON ML.yr = MC.yr AND ML.MonthAbbr = MC.MonthAbbr
    LEFT JOIN MonthlyTarget   MT ON ML.yr = MT.yr AND ML.MonthAbbr = MT.MonthAbbr
)
SELECT
      CU.MonthAbbr
    , CASE WHEN SUM(CU.tgt_ytd) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(SUM(CU.act_ytd) AS FLOAT) / SUM(CU.tgt_ytd)
      END AS [progress_cntrct_ytd_cond]
FROM Cumulated CU
GROUP BY CU.MonthAbbr
ORDER BY CU.MonthAbbr;

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. YTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 말까지 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   MonthAbbr | 실적 | 취소 | 타겟 | 달성률
   ============================================ */
;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]                                           AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                      AS year_start
        , MIN(CAL.[Date])                                      AS month_start
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
               THEN @AsOfDate
               ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]))
          END                                                  AS month_end
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate OR MONTH(CAL.[Date]) = MONTH(@AsOfDate))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, MonthlyTarget AS (
    /* 타겟: 월별 목표 합계 (tp_nm='계약') */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]        AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS mval
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.tp_nm = N'계약'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, TargetYtd AS (
    SELECT
          MA.yr
        , MA.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(ISNULL(MT.mval, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY MA.yr ORDER BY MA.month_start
                                        ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS tgt_ytd
    FROM MonthAnchor MA
    LEFT JOIN MonthlyTarget MT
           ON MA.yr = MT.yr AND MA.MonthAbbr = MT.MonthAbbr
)
SELECT
      A.MonthAbbr
    , ISNULL(SUM(CN.ac_val), 0)      AS N'실적'
    , ISNULL(SUM(CN.cancel_val), 0)  AS N'취소'
    , ISNULL(SUM(TY.tgt_ytd), 0)     AS N'타겟'
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(TY.tgt_ytd), 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(SUM(CN.total_val), 0) AS FLOAT) / SUM(TY.tgt_ytd)
      END                            AS N'달성률'
FROM MonthAnchor A
/* ---------- 계약 팩트: 실적 / 취소 / 달성률 분자 (월 앵커별 재평가) ----------
   ※ 8124 오류 회피: 외부 참조(A.month_end) 비교는 내부 파생 테이블 X에서
     행 단위로 먼저 계산하고, 집계는 X의 컬럼만으로 수행                    */
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT
          SUM(X.ac_cnt)     AS ac_val      -- 실적 (월말 시점 미취소)
        , SUM(X.cancel_cnt) AS cancel_val  -- 취소 (월말 시점 기취소)
        , SUM(X.cnt)        AS total_val   -- 달성률 분자 (취소 무관)
    FROM (
        SELECT
              F.cnt
            , CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NULL
                     OR F.cancel_dt > A.month_end
                   THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END AS ac_cnt
            , CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL
                    AND F.cancel_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, A.month_end)
                   THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END AS cancel_cnt
        FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt  = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            /* ---- YTD 누적 범위: 연초 ~ 해당 월말 ---- */
            AND CAL.[Date] >= A.year_start
            AND CAL.[Date] <= A.month_end

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    ) X
) CN
/* ---------- 타겟 YTD 누적 ---------- */
LEFT JOIN TargetYtd TY
       ON A.yr = TY.yr AND A.MonthAbbr = TY.MonthAbbr
GROUP BY A.MonthAbbr
ORDER BY A.MonthAbbr;

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. MTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 전체 합계)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   4. sales_mtd_(target)_cond
   -----------------------------------------------
   ※ 페이지 필터가 DIM_MNG_USER[name]에 직접 걸려 있어
     ISFILTERED(name) = 항상 TRUE
     → 항상 [4. sales_mtd_(target)_sc/coalesce] 분기
       (FCT_CRM_TARGET_M,
        DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE[target_grp_nm]='Main'
        AND DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE[tp_grp_1]='판매목표 대수')
   → COALESCE(val,0) = 월 목록 LEFT JOIN + ISNULL
   ============================================ */
SELECT
      C.MonthName
    , ISNULL(T.val, 0) AS [sales_mtd_(target)_cond]
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT MonthName
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR [Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
) C
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS N'목표'
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.target_grp_nm = N'Main'
        AND A.tp_grp_1      = N'판매목표 대수'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) T ON C.MonthName = T.MonthName
ORDER BY C.MonthName;

/* ============================================

DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================

DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   MonthName | 목표 | 실적 | 달성률
   - 목표   : sales_mtd_(target)_cond
              (FCT_CRM_TARGET_M, target_grp_nm='Main' AND tp_grp_1='판매목표 대수')
   - 실적   : sales_mtd
              (출고일 기준 해당 월, 출고월 말 기준 미취소)
   - 달성률 : progress_sales_mtd_cond = 실적 / 목표
              (분자 = sales_mtd_coalesce = 실적과 동일 계산)
   ============================================ */
SELECT
      C.MonthName
    , ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) AS N'목표'
    , ISNULL(ACT.val, 0) AS N'실적'
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(ACT.val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TGT.val
      END                AS N'달성률'
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT MonthName
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR [Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
) C
/* ---------- 실적 & 달성률 분자: 출고일 기준 판매 (동일 계산, 한 번만 집계) ---------- */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(F.cnt) AS val
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    /* 출고일 기준 달력 조인 (ALL(Calendar) + last_retail_sales_dt 범위 재현) */
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 출고월 말 기준 미취소 조건 (행 단위) ---- */
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > EOMONTH(F.last_retail_sales_dt))

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) ACT ON C.MonthName = ACT.MonthName
/* ---------- 목표: FCT_CRM_TARGET_M (Main / 판매목표 대수) ---------- */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS val
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.target_grp_nm = N'Main'
        AND A.tp_grp_1      = N'판매목표 대수'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) TGT ON C.MonthName = TGT.MonthName
ORDER BY C.MonthName;

dax_expression:
4. sales_mtd = 
var cal = 
CALCULATE(
    SUM('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cnt]) 
        , ALL('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS')
        ,'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt] > EOMONTH('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt], 0) || ISBLANK('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt])
        , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt] >= EOMONTH(MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date]),-1)+1
        , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt] <= MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date]))

return cal

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = '2026';  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 전체)
      DAX의 MAX(Date) = 달력 마지막 날짜 재현용.
      진행 중인 월을 오늘까지만 보려면 GETDATE() 지정
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   4. sales_mtd
   = SUM(cnt), ALL(Calendar)
     + last_retail_sales_dt ∈ [전월말+1, MAX(Date)]  → 출고일 기준 해당 월
     + cancel_dt IS NULL OR cancel_dt > EOMONTH(출고일)
       → 출고월 말 기준 미취소 건 (행 단위 판정)
   ※ 날짜 축이 계약일이 아니라 "출고일(last_retail_sales_dt)"
   ============================================ */
SELECT
      C.MonthName
    , ISNULL(T.val, 0) AS [sales_mtd]
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT MonthName
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR [Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
) C
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(F.cnt) AS N'실적'
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    /* ---- 출고일 기준으로 달력 조인 (ALL(Calendar) + last_retail_sales_dt 범위 재현) ---- */
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 출고월 말 기준 미취소 조건 (행 단위) ---- */
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > EOMONTH(F.last_retail_sales_dt))

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) T ON C.MonthName = T.MonthName
ORDER BY C.MonthName;

        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) TGT ON C.MonthName = TGT.MonthName
ORDER BY C.MonthName;

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = '2026';  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   4. progress_sales_mtd_cond
   -----------------------------------------------
   ※ 페이지 필터가 DIM_MNG_USER[name]에 직접 걸려 있어
     ISFILTERED(name) = 항상 TRUE
     → 항상 [4. progress_sales_mtd_sc_coaleasce] 분기
   = DIVIDE( [sales_mtd_coalesce], [sales_mtd_(target)_sc/coalesce], 0 )
   - 분자: FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS SUM(cnt)
           출고일(last_retail_sales_dt) 기준 해당 월,
           출고월 말 기준 미취소 건
   - 분모: FCT_CRM_TARGET_M SUM(target_cnt)
           target_grp_nm='Main' AND tp_grp_1='판매목표 대수'
   ============================================ */
SELECT
      C.MonthName
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(ACT.val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TGT.val
      END AS [progress_sales_mtd_cond]
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT MonthName
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR [Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
) C
/* ---------- 분자: sales_mtd_coalesce (출고일 기준) ---------- */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(F.cnt) AS val
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    /* 출고일 기준 달력 조인 (ALL(Calendar) + last_retail_sales_dt 범위 재현) */
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 출고월 말 기준 미취소 조건 (행 단위) ---- */
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > EOMONTH(F.last_retail_sales_dt))

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.MonthName
) ACT ON C.MonthName = ACT.MonthName
/* ---------- 분모: sales_mtd_(target)_sc/coalesce ---------- */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS N'달성률'
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))

        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))

   - 목표   : sales_mtd_(target)_cond
              (FCT_CRM_TARGET_M, target_grp_nm='Main' AND tp_grp_1='판매목표 대수')

              (분자 = sales_mtd_coalesce = 실적과 동일 계산)
   ============================================ */
SELECT
      C.MonthName
    , ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) AS N'목표'
    , ISNULL(ACT.val, 0) AS N'실적'
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(ACT.val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TGT.val
      END                AS N'달성률'
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT MonthName
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR [Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
) C

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
          CAL.MonthName
        , SUM(F.cnt) AS val
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    /* 출고일 기준 달력 조인 (ALL(Calendar) + last_retail_sales_dt 범위 재현) */
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key

    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key

        /* ---- 출고월 말 기준 미취소 조건 (행 단위) ---- */

        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))

/* ============================================

DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = '2026';  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]

DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]

DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]

DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. YTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   4. sales_ytd_(target)_cond
   -----------------------------------------------
   ※ 페이지 필터가 DIM_MNG_USER[name]에 직접 걸려 있어
     ISFILTERED(name) = 항상 TRUE
     → 항상 [4. sales_ytd_(target)_sc_coaleasce] 분기
       (FCT_CRM_TARGET_M,
        target_grp_nm='Main' AND tp_grp_1='판매목표 대수')
   → TOTALYTD = 연도 내 1월부터 해당 월까지 누적
   → COALESCE(cal,0) = 월 목록 LEFT JOIN + ISNULL
   ============================================ */
;WITH MonthList AS (
    /* 월 목록: 연도 × 월 (누적 순서용 월초 날짜 포함) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]      AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , MIN(CAL.[Date]) AS month_start
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, MonthlyTarget AS (
    /* 월별 목표 합계 (Main / 판매목표 대수) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]        AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS mval
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.target_grp_nm = N'Main'
        AND A.tp_grp_1      = N'판매목표 대수'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
SELECT
      ML.MonthAbbr
    , ISNULL(SUM(YTD.ytd_val), 0) AS N'목표'
FROM MonthList ML
LEFT JOIN (
    /* 연도 내 누적 (TOTALYTD 재현) */
    SELECT
          ML2.yr
        , ML2.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(ISNULL(MT.mval, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY ML2.yr ORDER BY ML2.month_start
                                        ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS ytd_val
    FROM MonthList ML2
    LEFT JOIN MonthlyTarget MT
           ON ML2.yr = MT.yr AND ML2.MonthAbbr = MT.MonthAbbr
) YTD ON ML.yr = YTD.yr AND ML.MonthAbbr = YTD.MonthAbbr
GROUP BY ML.MonthAbbr
ORDER BY ML.MonthAbbr;

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. YTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 말까지 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   MonthAbbr | 목표 | 실적 | 달성률
   - 목표   : sales_ytd_(target)_cond
              (FCT_CRM_TARGET_M, Main / 판매목표 대수, YTD 누적)
   - 실적   : sales_ytd
              (DISTINCTCOUNT(dlr_contract_no), 출고일 ∈ [연초, 월말],
               전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소 → 월 앵커별 재평가)
   - 달성률 : progress_sales_ytd_cond = 실적 / 목표
   ============================================ */
;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
    /* 월 앵커: 연도 × 월, 연초/월초/월말/전월말 (@AsOfDate 상한 적용) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]                                           AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                      AS year_start
        , MIN(CAL.[Date])                                      AS month_start
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
               THEN @AsOfDate
               ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]))
          END                                                  AS month_end
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
               THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
               ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
          END                                                  AS prev_month_end
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate OR MONTH(CAL.[Date]) = MONTH(@AsOfDate))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, MonthlyTarget AS (
    /* 목표: 월별 합계 (Main / 판매목표 대수) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]        AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS mval
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.target_grp_nm = N'Main'
        AND A.tp_grp_1      = N'판매목표 대수'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, TargetYtd AS (
    /* 목표 연도 내 누적 (TOTALYTD 재현) */
    SELECT
          MA.yr
        , MA.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(ISNULL(MT.mval, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY MA.yr ORDER BY MA.month_start
                                        ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS tgt_ytd
    FROM MonthAnchor MA
    LEFT JOIN MonthlyTarget MT
           ON MA.yr = MT.yr AND MA.MonthAbbr = MT.MonthAbbr
)
SELECT
      A.MonthAbbr
    , ISNULL(SUM(TY.tgt_ytd), 0) AS N'목표'
    , ISNULL(SUM(T.val), 0)      AS N'실적'
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(TY.tgt_ytd), 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(SUM(T.val), 0) AS FLOAT) / SUM(TY.tgt_ytd)
      END                        AS N'달성률'
FROM MonthAnchor A
/* ---------- 실적: sales_ytd (월 앵커별 재평가, 8124 회피 구조) ---------- */
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT X.dlr_contract_no) AS val
    FROM (
        SELECT F.dlr_contract_no
        FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
        /* 출고일 기준 달력 조인 (ALL(Calendar) + last_retail_sales_dt 범위 재현) */
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            /* ---- 출고일 기준 YTD 범위: 연초 ~ 해당 월말 ---- */
            AND F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
            AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end

            /* ---- 전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소 ---- */
            AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    ) X
) T
/* ---------- 목표: YTD 누적 ---------- */
LEFT JOIN TargetYtd TY
       ON A.yr = TY.yr AND A.MonthAbbr = TY.MonthAbbr
GROUP BY A.MonthAbbr
ORDER BY A.MonthAbbr;

4. sales_ytd = 
CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[dlr_contract_no]) 
    , ALL('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS')
    , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt] >= DATE(YEAR(MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])), 1,1)
    , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt] <= MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])
    ,'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt] > EOMONTH(MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date]), -1) || ISBLANK('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt])
    )
