   MonthAbbr | 목표 | 실적 | 달성률
   - 목표   : sales_ytd_(target)_cond
              (FCT_CRM_TARGET_M, Main / 판매목표 대수, YTD 누적)
   - 실적   : sales_ytd
              (DISTINCTCOUNT(dlr_contract_no), 출고일 ∈ [연초, 월말],
               전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소 → 월 앵커별 재평가)
   - 달성률 : progress_sales_ytd_cond = 실적 / 목표
   ============================================ */
;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
    /* 월 앵커: 연도 × 월, 연초/월초/월말/전월말 (@AsOfDate 상한 적용) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]                                           AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                      AS year_start
        , MIN(CAL.[Date])                                      AS month_start
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
               THEN @AsOfDate
               ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]))
          END                                                  AS month_end
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
               THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
               ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
          END                                                  AS prev_month_end
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate OR MONTH(CAL.[Date]) = MONTH(@AsOfDate))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, MonthlyTarget AS (
    /* 목표: 월별 합계 (Main / 판매목표 대수) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]        AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS mval
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.target_grp_nm = N'Main'
        AND A.tp_grp_1      = N'판매목표 대수'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, TargetYtd AS (
    /* 목표 연도 내 누적 (TOTALYTD 재현) */
    SELECT
          MA.yr
        , MA.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(ISNULL(MT.mval, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY MA.yr ORDER BY MA.month_start
                                        ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS tgt_ytd
    FROM MonthAnchor MA
    LEFT JOIN MonthlyTarget MT
           ON MA.yr = MT.yr AND MA.MonthAbbr = MT.MonthAbbr
)
SELECT
      A.MonthAbbr
    , ISNULL(SUM(TY.tgt_ytd), 0) AS N'목표'
    , ISNULL(SUM(T.val), 0)      AS N'실적'
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(TY.tgt_ytd), 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(SUM(T.val), 0) AS FLOAT) / SUM(TY.tgt_ytd)
      END                        AS N'달성률'
FROM MonthAnchor A
/* ---------- 실적: sales_ytd (월 앵커별 재평가, 8124 회피 구조) ---------- */
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT X.dlr_contract_no) AS val
    FROM (
        SELECT F.dlr_contract_no
        FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
        /* 출고일 기준 달력 조인 (ALL(Calendar) + last_retail_sales_dt 범위 재현) */
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            /* ---- 출고일 기준 YTD 범위: 연초 ~ 해당 월말 ---- */
            AND F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
            AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end

            /* ---- 전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소 ---- */
            AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    ) X
) T
/* ---------- 목표: YTD 누적 ---------- */
LEFT JOIN TargetYtd TY
       ON A.yr = TY.yr AND A.MonthAbbr = TY.MonthAbbr
GROUP BY A.MonthAbbr
ORDER BY A.MonthAbbr;

)
, MonthlyTarget AS (
    /* 목표: 월별 합계 (Main / 판매목표 대수) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]        AS yr
        , CAL.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(F.target_cnt) AS mval
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.target_grp_nm = N'Main'
        AND A.tp_grp_1      = N'판매목표 대수'
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
)
, TargetYtd AS (
    /* 목표 연도 내 누적 (TOTALYTD 재현) */
    SELECT
          MA.yr
        , MA.MonthAbbr
        , SUM(ISNULL(MT.mval, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY MA.yr ORDER BY MA.month_start
                                        ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS tgt_ytd
    FROM MonthAnchor MA
    LEFT JOIN MonthlyTarget MT
           ON MA.yr = MT.yr AND MA.MonthAbbr = MT.MonthAbbr
)
SELECT
      A.MonthAbbr
    , ISNULL(SUM(TY.tgt_ytd), 0) AS N'목표'
    , ISNULL(SUM(T.val), 0)      AS N'실적'
    , CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(TY.tgt_ytd), 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE CAST(ISNULL(SUM(T.val), 0) AS FLOAT) / SUM(TY.tgt_ytd)
      END                        AS N'달성률'
FROM MonthAnchor A
/* ---------- 실적: sales_ytd (월 앵커별 재평가, 8124 회피 구조) ---------- */
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT X.dlr_contract_no) AS val
    FROM (
        SELECT F.dlr_contract_no
        FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
        /* 출고일 기준 달력 조인 (ALL(Calendar) + last_retail_sales_dt 범위 재현) */
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            /* ---- 출고일 기준 YTD 범위: 연초 ~ 해당 월말 ---- */
            AND F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
            AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end

            /* ---- 전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소 ---- */
            AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    ) X
) T
/* ---------- 목표: YTD 누적 ---------- */
LEFT JOIN TargetYtd TY
       ON A.yr = TY.yr AND A.MonthAbbr = TY.MonthAbbr
GROUP BY A.MonthAbbr
ORDER BY A.MonthAbbr;

visual_name: 계약(계약번호, 고객명, 계약일자, 출고일자, 리드타임(일), Model, SFX, 재구매 여부, 자사금융 여부, 지불유형 여부)
value_label:
계약번호 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[dlr_contract_no], 
고객명 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[cust_nm], 
계약일자 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[contract_dt], 
출고일자 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[last_retail_sales_dt], 
리드타임(일) - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[lead_time], 
Model - ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[model_nm], 
SFX - ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd], 
재구매 여부 - ktws DIM_REPURC_SALES_TYPE[repurc_grp1], 
자사금융 여부 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[own_pay_flag], 
지불유형 여부 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[pay_type]
dax_expression: 3. cntrct_flag = IF(ISFILTERED('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[MonthName]), [3. cntrct_mtd], [3. cntrct_ytd])

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthName   NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthName] ※ cntrct_flag 분기용
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   계약 상세 목록
   계약번호 | 고객명 | 계약일자 | 출고일자 | 리드타임(일) | Model | SFX
   | 재구매 여부 | 자사금융 여부 | 지불유형 여부 | cntrct_flag
   -----------------------------------------------
   cntrct_flag = IF(ISFILTERED(MonthName), [cntrct_mtd], [cntrct_ytd])
   → @MonthName 지정 시: 해당 월(MTD) 범위의 계약별 SUM(cnt)
     @MonthName 미지정 시: 연초~@AsOfDate(YTD) 범위의 계약별 SUM(cnt)
   ※ 상세 행(계약번호) 단위에서는 MTD/YTD 모두
     "기간 내 해당 계약의 SUM(cnt)"로 수렴함
   ============================================ */
SELECT
      F.dlr_contract_no                    AS N'계약번호'
    , F.cust_nm                            AS N'고객명'
    , F.contract_dt                        AS N'계약일자'
    , F.last_retail_sales_dt               AS N'출고일자'
    , F.lead_time                          AS N'리드타임(일)'
    , S.model_nm                           AS N'Model'
    , S.sfx_cd                             AS N'SFX'
    , R.repurc_grp1                        AS N'재구매 여부'
    , F.own_pay_flag                       AS N'자사금융 여부'
    , F.pay_type                           AS N'지불유형 여부'
    , SUM(F.cnt)                           AS [cntrct_flag]
FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt    = CAL.[Date]
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key      = U.sc_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key     = D.dealer_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key   = S.spec_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key        = V.var_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key      = M.mdl_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_REPURC_SALES_TYPE R ON F.sales_tp_key   = R.sales_tp_key
WHERE 1 = 1
    /* ---- cntrct_flag 기간 분기 ----
       @MonthName 지정(ISFILTERED=TRUE) → MTD: 해당 월만
       @MonthName 미지정(ISFILTERED=FALSE) → YTD: 연초~기준일 전체 ---- */
    AND (@MonthName IS NULL
         OR CAL.MonthName IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MonthName, ',')))
    AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

    /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
    AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
    AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                        AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
    AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

    /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
    AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
    AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
    AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
    AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
    AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
    AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
    AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
    AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
    AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
    AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
GROUP BY
      F.dlr_contract_no
    , F.cust_nm
    , F.contract_dt
    , F.last_retail_sales_dt
    , F.lead_time
    , S.model_nm
    , S.sfx_cd
    , R.repurc_grp1
    , F.own_pay_flag
    , F.pay_type
ORDER BY
      F.dlr_contract_no;

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리합본:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthName   NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthName] ※ sales_flag 분기용
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   판매 상세 목록
   계약번호 | 고객명 | 계약일자 | 출고일자 | 리드타임(일) | Model | SFX
   | 재구매 여부 | 자사금융 여부 | 지불유형 | sales_flag
   -----------------------------------------------
   sales_flag = IF(ISFILTERED(MonthName), [sales_mtd], [sales_ytd])
   - MTD(@MonthName 지정): 출고월 = 선택 월,
       취소 판정 = 각 행의 출고월 말 기준 (행 단위)
       값 = SUM(cnt)
   - YTD(@MonthName 미지정): 출고일 ∈ [연초, 기준시점],
       취소 판정 = 기준시점의 전월 말 (앵커 단위)
       값 = DISTINCTCOUNT(dlr_contract_no) → 계약별 1
   ============================================ */
IF @MonthName IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 A: sales_mtd (출고월 기준, 행 단위 취소 판정) ---------- */
    SELECT
          F.dlr_contract_no            AS N'계약번호'
        , F.cust_nm                    AS N'고객명'
        , F.contract_dt                AS N'계약일자'
        , F.last_retail_sales_dt       AS N'출고일자'
        , F.lead_time                  AS N'리드타임(일)'
        , S.model_nm                   AS N'Model'
        , S.sfx_cd                     AS N'SFX'
        , R.repurc_grp1                AS N'재구매 여부'
        , F.own_pay_flag               AS N'자사금융 여부'
        , F.pay_type                   AS N'지불유형'
        , SUM(F.cnt)                   AS [sales_flag]
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    /* 출고일 기준 달력 조인 (ALL(Calendar) + last_retail_sales_dt 범위 재현) */
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_REPURC_SALES_TYPE R ON F.sales_tp_key = R.sales_tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        /* ---- 출고월 = 선택 월 ---- */
        AND CAL.MonthName IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MonthName, ','))
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 출고월 말 기준 미취소 (행 단위) ---- */
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > EOMONTH(F.last_retail_sales_dt))

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY
          F.dlr_contract_no
        , F.cust_nm
        , F.contract_dt
        , F.last_retail_sales_dt
        , F.lead_time
        , S.model_nm
        , S.sfx_cd
        , R.repurc_grp1
        , F.own_pay_flag
        , F.pay_type
    ORDER BY
          F.last_retail_sales_dt
        , F.dlr_contract_no;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 B: sales_ytd (출고일 YTD, 앵커 단위 취소 판정) ---------- */
    ;WITH YearAnchor AS (
        /* 연도별 기준시점(period_end)과 전월말(prev_month_end)
           = DAX의 MAX(Date), EOMONTH(MAX(Date),-1) 재현 */
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
              END                                               AS period_end
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
              END                                               AS prev_month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year]
    )
    SELECT
          F.dlr_contract_no                  AS N'계약번호'
        , F.cust_nm                          AS N'고객명'
        , F.contract_dt                      AS N'계약일자'
        , F.last_retail_sales_dt             AS N'출고일자'
        , F.lead_time                        AS N'리드타임(일)'
        , S.model_nm                         AS N'Model'
        , S.sfx_cd                           AS N'SFX'
        , R.repurc_grp1                      AS N'재구매 여부'
        , F.own_pay_flag                     AS N'자사금융 여부'
        , F.pay_type                         AS N'지불유형'
        , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no)  AS [sales_flag]   -- DISTINCTCOUNT → 계약별 1
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
    JOIN YearAnchor                    A   ON CAL.[Year]       = A.yr
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key      = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key     = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key   = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key        = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key      = M.mdl_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_REPURC_SALES_TYPE R ON F.sales_tp_key   = R.sales_tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        /* ---- 출고일 YTD 범위: 연초 ~ 기준시점 ---- */
        AND F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
        AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.period_end

        /* ---- 기준시점 전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소 (앵커 단위) ---- */
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY
          F.dlr_contract_no
        , F.cust_nm
        , F.contract_dt
        , F.last_retail_sales_dt
        , F.lead_time
        , S.model_nm
        , S.sfx_cd
        , R.repurc_grp1
        , F.own_pay_flag
        , F.pay_type
    ORDER BY
          F.dlr_contract_no
END

raw_columns.col_7:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
                                            -- NULL = SC 열 미표시(합산) / 'ALL' = 전체 SC 표시 / 값 = 해당 SC만 표시

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExcludeFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(100) = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExcludeNames      NVARCHAR(500) = N'고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExcludeUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 개체(시각적 개체) 필터 변수
      - tp_grp_1 공백 아님 + 아래 목록 제외
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExcludeTpGrp1 NVARCHAR(500) = N'기회진행,연락,판매목표 대수,활동기준 대수';

/* ============================================
   4. 측정값 내부 필터 변수
      - act_mtd_(ac)_preOp 의 CALCULATE 필터
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @MeasureTpGrp1 NVARCHAR(200) = N'관계형성,기회창출';

/* ============================================
   5. 본문 — @ScName 값에 따라 분기
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    /* ----------------------------------------
       분기 A: SC 열 미표시 (SC 걷어내고 합산)
       ---------------------------------------- */
    WITH
    UserDim AS (
        SELECT
              usr.sc_key
            , usr.BRAND
            , dlr.dealer_nm
            , usr.group_name
            , usr.dept_nm
            , usr.active_yn
        FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER usr
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER dlr
               ON usr.dealer_key = dlr.dealer_key
        WHERE ISNULL(usr.facade_sc_yn, N'') <> @ExcludeFacadeScYn
          AND usr.[name] NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeNames, ','))
          AND usr.user_id NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeUserIds, ','))
          AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR usr.BRAND      IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
          AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR dlr.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
          AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR usr.group_name IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
          AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR usr.dept_nm    IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
          AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR usr.active_yn  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
    ),
    ActType AS (
        SELECT typ.tp_key, typ.tp_grp_1
        FROM ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE typ
        WHERE ISNULL(typ.tp_grp_1, N'') <> N''
          AND typ.tp_grp_1 NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeTpGrp1, ','))
          AND typ.tp_grp_1 IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MeasureTpGrp1, ','))
    ),
    Cal AS (
        SELECT
              cal.[Date]
            , cal.[Year]
            , cal.MonthNumber
            , cal.DayName
            , DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(cal.[Date]), MONTH(cal.[Date]), 1) AS month_start
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS cal
        WHERE (@Year        IS NULL OR cal.[Year]       IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
          AND (@MonthNumber IS NULL OR cal.MonthNumber  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MonthNumber, ',')))
    ),
    DailyAct AS (
        SELECT
              c.month_start
            , c.[Date]
            , u.BRAND, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.active_yn
            , t.tp_grp_1
            , SUM(f.actual_cnt) AS day_cnt
        FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 f
        INNER JOIN Cal     c ON f.act_dt_fr = c.[Date]
        INNER JOIN UserDim u ON f.sc_key    = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN ActType t ON f.tp_key    = t.tp_key
        GROUP BY
              c.month_start, c.[Date]
            , u.BRAND, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.active_yn
            , t.tp_grp_1
    ),
    Spine AS (
        SELECT
              c.[Date], c.[Year], c.MonthNumber, c.DayName, c.month_start
            , g.BRAND, g.dealer_nm, g.group_name, g.dept_nm, g.active_yn
            , g.tp_grp_1
        FROM Cal c
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT DISTINCT month_start, BRAND, dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, active_yn, tp_grp_1
            FROM DailyAct
        ) g ON c.month_start = g.month_start
    )
    SELECT
          s.[Year]                             AS [연도]
        , s.MonthNumber                        AS [월]
        , s.BRAND                              AS [브랜드]
        , s.dealer_nm                          AS [딜러]
        , s.group_name                         AS [전시장]
        , s.dept_nm                            AS [팀]
        , s.active_yn                          AS [재직여부]
        , s.DayName                            AS [일]
        , s.tp_grp_1                           AS [활동유형 범주]
        , SUM(ISNULL(d.day_cnt, 0)) OVER (
              PARTITION BY s.month_start, s.BRAND, s.dealer_nm, s.group_name,
                           s.dept_nm, s.active_yn, s.tp_grp_1
              ORDER BY s.[Date]
              ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
          )                                    AS [활동수]
    FROM Spine s
    LEFT JOIN DailyAct d
           ON  s.[Date]      = d.[Date]
           AND s.month_start = d.month_start
           AND s.BRAND       = d.BRAND
           AND ISNULL(s.dealer_nm, N'')  = ISNULL(d.dealer_nm, N'')
           AND ISNULL(s.group_name, N'') = ISNULL(d.group_name, N'')
           AND ISNULL(s.dept_nm, N'')    = ISNULL(d.dept_nm, N'')
           AND ISNULL(s.active_yn, N'')  = ISNULL(d.active_yn, N'')
           AND s.tp_grp_1    = d.tp_grp_1
    ORDER BY
          s.[Year], s.MonthNumber, s.BRAND, s.dealer_nm, s.group_name,
          s.dept_nm, s.tp_grp_1, s.[Date];
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    /* ----------------------------------------
       분기 B: SC 열 표시
       - @ScName = 'ALL' → 전체 SC
       - @ScName = 값     → 해당 SC만
       ---------------------------------------- */
    WITH
    UserDim AS (
        SELECT
              usr.sc_key
            , usr.BRAND
            , dlr.dealer_nm
            , usr.group_name
            , usr.dept_nm
            , usr.active_yn
            , usr.[name]
        FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER usr
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER dlr
               ON usr.dealer_key = dlr.dealer_key
        WHERE ISNULL(usr.facade_sc_yn, N'') <> @ExcludeFacadeScYn
          AND usr.[name] NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeNames, ','))
          AND usr.user_id NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeUserIds, ','))
          AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR usr.BRAND      IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
          AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR dlr.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
          AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR usr.group_name IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
          AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR usr.dept_nm    IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
          AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR usr.active_yn  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
          AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR usr.[name] IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    ),
    ActType AS (
        SELECT typ.tp_key, typ.tp_grp_1
        FROM ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE typ
        WHERE ISNULL(typ.tp_grp_1, N'') <> N''
          AND typ.tp_grp_1 NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeTpGrp1, ','))
          AND typ.tp_grp_1 IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MeasureTpGrp1, ','))
    ),
    Cal AS (
        SELECT
              cal.[Date]
            , cal.[Year]
            , cal.MonthNumber
            , cal.DayName
            , DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(cal.[Date]), MONTH(cal.[Date]), 1) AS month_start
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS cal
        WHERE (@Year        IS NULL OR cal.[Year]       IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
          AND (@MonthNumber IS NULL OR cal.MonthNumber  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MonthNumber, ',')))
    ),
    DailyAct AS (
        SELECT
              c.month_start
            , c.[Date]
            , u.BRAND, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.active_yn, u.[name]
            , t.tp_grp_1
            , SUM(f.actual_cnt) AS day_cnt
        FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 f
        INNER JOIN Cal     c ON f.act_dt_fr = c.[Date]
        INNER JOIN UserDim u ON f.sc_key    = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN ActType t ON f.tp_key    = t.tp_key
        GROUP BY
              c.month_start, c.[Date]
            , u.BRAND, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.active_yn, u.[name]
            , t.tp_grp_1
    ),
    Spine AS (
        SELECT
              c.[Date], c.[Year], c.MonthNumber, c.DayName, c.month_start
            , g.BRAND, g.dealer_nm, g.group_name, g.dept_nm, g.active_yn, g.[name]
            , g.tp_grp_1
        FROM Cal c
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT DISTINCT month_start, BRAND, dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, active_yn, [name], tp_grp_1
            FROM DailyAct
        ) g ON c.month_start = g.month_start
    )
    SELECT
          s.[Year]                             AS [연도]
        , s.MonthNumber                        AS [월]
        , s.BRAND                              AS [브랜드]
        , s.dealer_nm                          AS [딜러]
        , s.group_name                         AS [전시장]
        , s.dept_nm                            AS [팀]
        , s.active_yn                          AS [재직여부]
        , s.[name]                             AS [SC]
        , s.DayName                            AS [일]
        , s.tp_grp_1                           AS [활동유형 범주]
        , SUM(ISNULL(d.day_cnt, 0)) OVER (
              PARTITION BY s.month_start, s.BRAND, s.dealer_nm, s.group_name,
                           s.dept_nm, s.active_yn, s.[name], s.tp_grp_1
              ORDER BY s.[Date]
              ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
          )                                    AS [활동수]
    FROM Spine s
    LEFT JOIN DailyAct d
           ON  s.[Date]      = d.[Date]
           AND s.month_start = d.month_start
           AND s.BRAND       = d.BRAND
           AND ISNULL(s.dealer_nm, N'')  = ISNULL(d.dealer_nm, N'')
           AND ISNULL(s.group_name, N'') = ISNULL(d.group_name, N'')
           AND ISNULL(s.dept_nm, N'')    = ISNULL(d.dept_nm, N'')
           AND ISNULL(s.active_yn, N'')  = ISNULL(d.active_yn, N'')
           AND s.[name]      = d.[name]
           AND s.tp_grp_1    = d.tp_grp_1
    ORDER BY
          s.[Year], s.MonthNumber, s.BRAND, s.dealer_nm, s.group_name,
          s.dept_nm, s.[name], s.tp_grp_1, s.[Date];
END

raw_columns.col_7:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
                                            -- NULL = SC 열 미표시(합산) / 'ALL' = 전체 SC 표시 / 값 = 해당 SC만 표시

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExcludeFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(100) = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExcludeNames      NVARCHAR(500) = N'고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExcludeUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 개체(시각적 개체) 필터 변수
      - ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE[tp_grp_1] 공백 아님 + 아래 목록 제외
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExcludeTpGrp1 NVARCHAR(500) = N'기회진행,연락,판매목표 대수,활동기준 대수';

/* ============================================
   4. 측정값 내부 필터 변수
      - act_mtd_(target)_preOp 의 CALCULATE 필터
      - ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[tp_grp_1] 기준
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @MeasureOrderTpGrp1 NVARCHAR(200) = N'관계형성,기회창출';

/* ============================================
   5. 본문 — @ScName 값에 따라 분기
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    /* ----------------------------------------
       분기 A: SC 열 미표시 (SC 걷어내고 합산)
       ---------------------------------------- */
    WITH
    UserDim AS (
        SELECT
              usr.sc_key
            , usr.BRAND
            , dlr.dealer_nm
            , usr.group_name
            , usr.dept_nm
            , usr.active_yn
        FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER usr
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER dlr
               ON usr.dealer_key = dlr.dealer_key
        WHERE ISNULL(usr.facade_sc_yn, N'') <> @ExcludeFacadeScYn
          AND usr.[name] NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeNames, ','))
          AND usr.user_id NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeUserIds, ','))
          AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR usr.BRAND      IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
          AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR dlr.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
          AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR usr.group_name IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
          AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR usr.dept_nm    IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
          AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR usr.active_yn  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
    ),
    ActType AS (
        /* 개체 필터: DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE[tp_grp_1]
           측정값 필터: DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[tp_grp_1] → common_tp_nm 으로 전파 */
        SELECT typ.tp_key, typ.tp_grp_1
        FROM ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE typ
        WHERE ISNULL(typ.tp_grp_1, N'') <> N''
          AND typ.tp_grp_1 NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeTpGrp1, ','))
          AND typ.common_tp_nm IN (
                SELECT ord.common_tp_nm
                FROM ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER ord
                WHERE ord.tp_grp_1 IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MeasureOrderTpGrp1, ','))
              )
    ),
    Cal AS (
        SELECT
              cal.[Date]
            , cal.[Year]
            , cal.MonthNumber
            , cal.DayName
            , DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(cal.[Date]), MONTH(cal.[Date]), 1) AS month_start
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS cal
        WHERE (@Year        IS NULL OR cal.[Year]       IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
          AND (@MonthNumber IS NULL OR cal.MonthNumber  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MonthNumber, ',')))
    ),
    DailyTarget AS (
        SELECT
              c.month_start
            , c.[Date]
            , u.BRAND, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.active_yn
            , t.tp_grp_1
            , SUM(f.target_cnt) AS day_cnt
        FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_D f
        INNER JOIN Cal     c ON f.daily_dt = c.[Date]
        INNER JOIN UserDim u ON f.sc_key   = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN ActType t ON f.type_cd  = t.tp_key
        GROUP BY
              c.month_start, c.[Date]
            , u.BRAND, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.active_yn
            , t.tp_grp_1
    ),
    Spine AS (
        SELECT
              c.[Date], c.[Year], c.MonthNumber, c.DayName, c.month_start
            , g.BRAND, g.dealer_nm, g.group_name, g.dept_nm, g.active_yn
            , g.tp_grp_1
        FROM Cal c
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT DISTINCT month_start, BRAND, dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, active_yn, tp_grp_1
            FROM DailyTarget
        ) g ON c.month_start = g.month_start
    )
    SELECT
          s.[Year]                             AS [연도]
        , s.MonthNumber                        AS [월]
        , s.BRAND                              AS [브랜드]
        , s.dealer_nm                          AS [딜러]
        , s.group_name                         AS [전시장]
        , s.dept_nm                            AS [팀]
        , s.active_yn                          AS [재직여부]
        , s.DayName                            AS [일]
        , s.tp_grp_1                           AS [활동유형 범주]
        , SUM(ISNULL(d.day_cnt, 0)) OVER (
              PARTITION BY s.month_start, s.BRAND, s.dealer_nm, s.group_name,
                           s.dept_nm, s.active_yn, s.tp_grp_1
              ORDER BY s.[Date]
              ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
          )                                    AS [활동타겟수]
    FROM Spine s
    LEFT JOIN DailyTarget d
           ON  s.[Date]      = d.[Date]
           AND s.month_start = d.month_start
           AND s.BRAND       = d.BRAND
           AND ISNULL(s.dealer_nm, N'')  = ISNULL(d.dealer_nm, N'')
           AND ISNULL(s.group_name, N'') = ISNULL(d.group_name, N'')
           AND ISNULL(s.dept_nm, N'')    = ISNULL(d.dept_nm, N'')
           AND ISNULL(s.active_yn, N'')  = ISNULL(d.active_yn, N'')
           AND s.tp_grp_1    = d.tp_grp_1
    ORDER BY
          s.[Year], s.MonthNumber, s.BRAND, s.dealer_nm, s.group_name,
          s.dept_nm, s.tp_grp_1, s.[Date];
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    /* ----------------------------------------
       분기 B: SC 열 표시
       - @ScName = 'ALL' → 전체 SC
       - @ScName = 값     → 해당 SC만
       ---------------------------------------- */
    WITH
    UserDim AS (
        SELECT
              usr.sc_key
            , usr.BRAND
            , dlr.dealer_nm
            , usr.group_name
            , usr.dept_nm
            , usr.active_yn
            , usr.[name]
        FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER usr
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER dlr
               ON usr.dealer_key = dlr.dealer_key
        WHERE ISNULL(usr.facade_sc_yn, N'') <> @ExcludeFacadeScYn
          AND usr.[name] NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeNames, ','))
          AND usr.user_id NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeUserIds, ','))
          AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR usr.BRAND      IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
          AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR dlr.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
          AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR usr.group_name IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
          AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR usr.dept_nm    IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
          AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR usr.active_yn  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
          AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR usr.[name] IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    ),
    ActType AS (
        SELECT typ.tp_key, typ.tp_grp_1
        FROM ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE typ
        WHERE ISNULL(typ.tp_grp_1, N'') <> N''
          AND typ.tp_grp_1 NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeTpGrp1, ','))
          AND typ.common_tp_nm IN (
                SELECT ord.common_tp_nm
                FROM ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER ord
                WHERE ord.tp_grp_1 IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MeasureOrderTpGrp1, ','))
              )
    ),
    Cal AS (
        SELECT
              cal.[Date]
            , cal.[Year]
            , cal.MonthNumber
            , cal.DayName
            , DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(cal.[Date]), MONTH(cal.[Date]), 1) AS month_start
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS cal
        WHERE (@Year        IS NULL OR cal.[Year]       IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
          AND (@MonthNumber IS NULL OR cal.MonthNumber  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MonthNumber, ',')))
    ),
    DailyTarget AS (
        SELECT
              c.month_start
            , c.[Date]
            , u.BRAND, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.active_yn, u.[name]
            , t.tp_grp_1
            , SUM(f.target_cnt) AS day_cnt
        FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_D f
        INNER JOIN Cal     c ON f.daily_dt = c.[Date]
        INNER JOIN UserDim u ON f.sc_key   = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN ActType t ON f.type_cd  = t.tp_key
        GROUP BY
              c.month_start, c.[Date]
            , u.BRAND, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.active_yn, u.[name]
            , t.tp_grp_1
    ),
    Spine AS (
        SELECT
              c.[Date], c.[Year], c.MonthNumber, c.DayName, c.month_start
            , g.BRAND, g.dealer_nm, g.group_name, g.dept_nm, g.active_yn, g.[name]
            , g.tp_grp_1
        FROM Cal c
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT DISTINCT month_start, BRAND, dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, active_yn, [name], tp_grp_1
            FROM DailyTarget
        ) g ON c.month_start = g.month_start
    )
    SELECT
          s.[Year]                             AS [연도]
        , s.MonthNumber                        AS [월]
        , s.BRAND                              AS [브랜드]
        , s.dealer_nm                          AS [딜러]
        , s.group_name                         AS [전시장]
        , s.dept_nm                            AS [팀]
        , s.active_yn                          AS [재직여부]
        , s.[name]                             AS [SC]
        , s.DayName                            AS [일]
        , s.tp_grp_1                           AS [활동유형 범주]
        , SUM(ISNULL(d.day_cnt, 0)) OVER (
              PARTITION BY s.month_start, s.BRAND, s.dealer_nm, s.group_name,
                           s.dept_nm, s.active_yn, s.[name], s.tp_grp_1
              ORDER BY s.[Date]
              ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
          )                                    AS [활동타겟수]
    FROM Spine s
    LEFT JOIN DailyTarget d
           ON  s.[Date]      = d.[Date]
           AND s.month_start = d.month_start
           AND s.BRAND       = d.BRAND
           AND ISNULL(s.dealer_nm, N'')  = ISNULL(d.dealer_nm, N'')
           AND ISNULL(s.group_name, N'') = ISNULL(d.group_name, N'')
           AND ISNULL(s.dept_nm, N'')    = ISNULL(d.dept_nm, N'')
           AND ISNULL(s.active_yn, N'')  = ISNULL(d.active_yn, N'')
           AND s.[name]      = d.[name]
           AND s.tp_grp_1    = d.tp_grp_1
    ORDER BY
          s.[Year], s.MonthNumber, s.BRAND, s.dealer_nm, s.group_name,
          s.dept_nm, s.[name], s.tp_grp_1, s.[Date];
END

raw_columns.col_7:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
                                            -- NULL = SC 열 미표시(합산) / 'ALL' = 전체 SC 표시 / 값 = 해당 SC만 표시

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExcludeFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(100) = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExcludeNames      NVARCHAR(500) = N'고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExcludeUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 개체(시각적 개체) 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExcludeTpGrp1 NVARCHAR(500) = N'기회진행,연락,판매목표 대수,활동기준 대수';

/* ============================================
   4. 측정값 내부 변수 (act_mtd_(avg6m))
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @MeasureTpGrp1 NVARCHAR(200) = N'관계형성,기회창출';
DECLARE @Dday          DATE          = '2025-12-01';   -- VAR dday
DECLARE @MaxLookback   INT           = 6;

/* ============================================
   5. 본문 — @ScName 값에 따라 분기
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    /* ----------------------------------------
       분기 A: SC 열 미표시 (name 미포함 합산)
       ---------------------------------------- */
    WITH
    UserDim AS (
        SELECT
              usr.sc_key
            , ISNULL(usr.BRAND, N'')      AS BRAND
            , ISNULL(dlr.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_nm
            , ISNULL(usr.group_name, N'') AS group_name
            , ISNULL(usr.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_nm
            , ISNULL(usr.active_yn, N'')  AS active_yn
        FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER usr
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER dlr
               ON usr.dealer_key = dlr.dealer_key
        WHERE ISNULL(usr.facade_sc_yn, N'') <> @ExcludeFacadeScYn
          AND usr.[name] NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeNames, ','))
          AND usr.user_id NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeUserIds, ','))
          AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR usr.BRAND      IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
          AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR dlr.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
          AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR usr.group_name IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
          AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR usr.dept_nm    IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
          AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR usr.active_yn  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
    ),
    /* 슬라이서 미적용 달력 기반 일별 합계 (REMOVEFILTERS 재현, @Dday 이후) */
    Daily AS (
        SELECT
              DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(calx.[Date]), MONTH(calx.[Date]), 1) AS month_start
            , DAY(calx.[Date]) AS day_no
            , u.BRAND, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.active_yn
            , typ.tp_grp_1
            , SUM(f.actual_cnt) AS day_cnt
        FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 f
        INNER JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS calx ON f.act_dt_fr = calx.[Date]
        INNER JOIN UserDim u ON f.sc_key = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE typ
                ON f.tp_key = typ.tp_key
               AND ISNULL(typ.tp_grp_1, N'') <> N''
               AND typ.tp_grp_1 NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeTpGrp1, ','))
               AND typ.tp_grp_1 IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MeasureTpGrp1, ','))
        WHERE calx.[Date] >= @Dday
        GROUP BY
              DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(calx.[Date]), MONTH(calx.[Date]), 1)
            , DAY(calx.[Date])
            , u.BRAND, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.active_yn
            , typ.tp_grp_1
    ),
    /* 축 날짜 (슬라이서 적용 달력, AvailMonths > 0 만) */
    Axis AS (
        SELECT
              cal.[Date]
            , cal.[Year]
            , cal.MonthNumber
            , cal.DayName
            , DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(cal.[Date]), MONTH(cal.[Date]), 1) AS month_start
            , DAY(cal.[Date]) AS day_num
            , CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, @Dday, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(cal.[Date]), MONTH(cal.[Date]), 1)) > @MaxLookback
                   THEN @MaxLookback
                   ELSE DATEDIFF(MONTH, @Dday, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(cal.[Date]), MONTH(cal.[Date]), 1)) END AS avail_months
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS cal
        WHERE (@Year        IS NULL OR cal.[Year]       IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
          AND (@MonthNumber IS NULL OR cal.MonthNumber  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MonthNumber, ',')))
          AND DATEDIFF(MONTH, @Dday, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(cal.[Date]), MONTH(cal.[Date]), 1)) > 0
    ),
    /* 활동 존재 월 × 그룹 조합 */
    GM AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
              month_start, BRAND, dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, active_yn, tp_grp_1
        FROM Daily
    ),
    /* 스파인: 축 날짜 × 조회 구간 내 활동 있는 조합 */
    Spine AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
              a.[Date], a.[Year], a.MonthNumber, a.DayName, a.month_start, a.day_num, a.avail_months
            , g.BRAND, g.dealer_nm, g.group_name, g.dept_nm, g.active_yn, g.tp_grp_1
        FROM Axis a
        INNER JOIN GM g
                ON g.month_start >= DATEADD(MONTH, -a.avail_months, a.month_start)
               AND g.month_start <  a.month_start
    )
    SELECT
          s.[Year]                    AS [연도]
        , s.MonthNumber               AS [월]
        , NULLIF(s.BRAND, N'')        AS [브랜드]
        , NULLIF(s.dealer_nm, N'')    AS [딜러]
        , NULLIF(s.group_name, N'')   AS [전시장]
        , NULLIF(s.dept_nm, N'')      AS [팀]
        , NULLIF(s.active_yn, N'')    AS [재직여부]
        , s.DayName                   AS [일]
        , s.tp_grp_1                  AS [활동유형 범주]
        , CAST(SUM(ISNULL(d.day_cnt, 0)) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) / s.avail_months AS [평균활동추세(지난6개월)]
    FROM Spine s
    LEFT JOIN Daily d
           ON  d.BRAND      = s.BRAND
           AND d.dealer_nm  = s.dealer_nm
           AND d.group_name = s.group_name
           AND d.dept_nm    = s.dept_nm
           AND d.active_yn  = s.active_yn
           AND d.tp_grp_1   = s.tp_grp_1
           AND d.month_start >= DATEADD(MONTH, -s.avail_months, s.month_start)
           AND d.month_start <  s.month_start
           AND d.day_no      <= s.day_num
    GROUP BY
          s.[Date], s.[Year], s.MonthNumber, s.DayName, s.avail_months
        , s.BRAND, s.dealer_nm, s.group_name, s.dept_nm, s.active_yn, s.tp_grp_1
    ORDER BY
          s.[Year], s.MonthNumber, s.BRAND, s.dealer_nm, s.group_name,
          s.dept_nm, s.tp_grp_1, s.[Date];
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    /* ----------------------------------------
       분기 B: SC 열 표시 ('ALL' = 전체, 값 = 해당 SC만)
       ---------------------------------------- */
    WITH
    UserDim AS (
        SELECT
              usr.sc_key
            , ISNULL(usr.BRAND, N'')      AS BRAND
            , ISNULL(dlr.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_nm
            , ISNULL(usr.group_name, N'') AS group_name
            , ISNULL(usr.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_nm
            , ISNULL(usr.active_yn, N'')  AS active_yn
            , ISNULL(usr.[name], N'')     AS [name]
        FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER usr
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER dlr
               ON usr.dealer_key = dlr.dealer_key
        WHERE ISNULL(usr.facade_sc_yn, N'') <> @ExcludeFacadeScYn
          AND usr.[name] NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeNames, ','))
          AND usr.user_id NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeUserIds, ','))
          AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR usr.BRAND      IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
          AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR dlr.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
          AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR usr.group_name IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
          AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR usr.dept_nm    IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
          AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR usr.active_yn  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
          AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR usr.[name] IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    ),
    Daily AS (
        SELECT
              DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(calx.[Date]), MONTH(calx.[Date]), 1) AS month_start
            , DAY(calx.[Date]) AS day_no
            , u.BRAND, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.active_yn, u.[name]
            , typ.tp_grp_1
            , SUM(f.actual_cnt) AS day_cnt
        FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 f
        INNER JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS calx ON f.act_dt_fr = calx.[Date]
        INNER JOIN UserDim u ON f.sc_key = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE typ
                ON f.tp_key = typ.tp_key
               AND ISNULL(typ.tp_grp_1, N'') <> N''
               AND typ.tp_grp_1 NOT IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExcludeTpGrp1, ','))
               AND typ.tp_grp_1 IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MeasureTpGrp1, ','))
        WHERE calx.[Date] >= @Dday
        GROUP BY
              DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(calx.[Date]), MONTH(calx.[Date]), 1)
            , DAY(calx.[Date])
            , u.BRAND, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.active_yn, u.[name]
            , typ.tp_grp_1
    ),
    Axis AS (
        SELECT
              cal.[Date]
            , cal.[Year]
            , cal.MonthNumber
            , cal.DayName
            , DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(cal.[Date]), MONTH(cal.[Date]), 1) AS month_start
            , DAY(cal.[Date]) AS day_num
            , CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MONTH, @Dday, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(cal.[Date]), MONTH(cal.[Date]), 1)) > @MaxLookback
                   THEN @MaxLookback
                   ELSE DATEDIFF(MONTH, @Dday, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(cal.[Date]), MONTH(cal.[Date]), 1)) END AS avail_months
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS cal
        WHERE (@Year        IS NULL OR cal.[Year]       IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
          AND (@MonthNumber IS NULL OR cal.MonthNumber  IN (SELECT TRIM(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MonthNumber, ',')))
          AND DATEDIFF(MONTH, @Dday, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(cal.[Date]), MONTH(cal.[Date]), 1)) > 0
    ),
    GM AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
              month_start, BRAND, dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, active_yn, [name], tp_grp_1
        FROM Daily
    ),
    Spine AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
              a.[Date], a.[Year], a.MonthNumber, a.DayName, a.month_start, a.day_num, a.avail_months
            , g.BRAND, g.dealer_nm, g.group_name, g.dept_nm, g.active_yn, g.[name], g.tp_grp_1
        FROM Axis a
        INNER JOIN GM g
                ON g.month_start >= DATEADD(MONTH, -a.avail_months, a.month_start)
               AND g.month_start <  a.month_start
    )
    SELECT
          s.[Year]                    AS [연도]
        , s.MonthNumber               AS [월]
        , NULLIF(s.BRAND, N'')        AS [브랜드]
        , NULLIF(s.dealer_nm, N'')    AS [딜러]
        , NULLIF(s.group_name, N'')   AS [전시장]
        , NULLIF(s.dept_nm, N'')      AS [팀]
        , NULLIF(s.active_yn, N'')    AS [재직여부]
        , NULLIF(s.[name], N'')       AS [SC]
        , s.DayName                   AS [일]
        , s.tp_grp_1                  AS [활동유형 범주]
        , CAST(SUM(ISNULL(d.day_cnt, 0)) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) / s.avail_months AS [평균활동추세(지난6개월)]
    FROM Spine s
    LEFT JOIN Daily d
           ON  d.BRAND      = s.BRAND
           AND d.dealer_nm  = s.dealer_nm
           AND d.group_name = s.group_name
           AND d.dept_nm    = s.dept_nm
           AND d.active_yn  = s.active_yn
           AND d.[name]     = s.[name]
           AND d.tp_grp_1   = s.tp_grp_1
           AND d.month_start >= DATEADD(MONTH, -s.avail_months, s.month_start)
           AND d.month_start <  s.month_start
           AND d.day_no      <= s.day_num
    GROUP BY
          s.[Date], s.[Year], s.MonthNumber, s.DayName, s.avail_months
        , s.BRAND, s.dealer_nm, s.group_name, s.dept_nm, s.active_yn, s.[name], s.tp_grp_1
    ORDER BY
          s.[Year], s.MonthNumber, s.BRAND, s.dealer_nm, s.group_name,
          s.dept_nm, s.[name], s.tp_grp_1, s.[Date];
END

dax_expression:
4. sales_ytd = 
CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[dlr_contract_no]) 
    , ALL('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS')
    , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt] >= DATE(YEAR(MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])), 1,1)
    , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt] <= MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])
    ,'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt] > EOMONTH(MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date]), -1) || ISBLANK('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt])
    )

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber] ※ 신규 슬라이서
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 달력/슬라이서 범위의 마지막 날짜)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   모델명 | sales_ytd
   -----------------------------------------------
   sales_ytd = DISTINCTCOUNT(dlr_contract_no), ALL(Calendar)
     + last_retail_sales_dt ∈ [연초, MAX(Date)]
     + cancel_dt > EOMONTH(MAX(Date),-1) OR cancel_dt IS NULL
   ※ MAX(Date) = (Year/MonthNumber 슬라이서로 걸러진) 달력의 마지막 날짜
     → MonthNumber 선택 시: 기준시점 = 선택월 말일,
       YTD 범위 = [연초, 선택월 말], 취소 판정 = 선택월 전월 말
   ============================================ */
;WITH YearAnchor AS (
    /* 연도별 기준시점: 슬라이서(@Year, @MonthNumber) 컨텍스트 안의 MAX(Date) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
        , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
               THEN @AsOfDate
               ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
          END                                               AS period_end
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
               THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
               ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
          END                                               AS prev_month_end
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year        IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]        IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@MonthNumber IS NULL OR CAL.MonthNumber   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MonthNumber, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year]
)
SELECT
      S.model_nm                          AS N'모델명'
    , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no)   AS [sales_ytd]
FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC           S   ON F.cn_vehic_key   = S.spec_key
JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
JOIN YearAnchor                    A   ON CAL.[Year]       = A.yr
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key      = U.sc_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key     = D.dealer_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key        = V.var_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key      = M.mdl_key
WHERE 1 = 1
    /* ---- 출고일 YTD 범위: 연초 ~ 기준시점 (ALL(Calendar) + 범위 재현) ---- */
    AND F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
    AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.period_end

    /* ---- 기준시점 전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소 ---- */
    AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

    /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
    AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
    AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                        AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
    AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

    /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
    AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
    AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
    AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
    AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
    AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
    AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
    AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
    AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
    AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
GROUP BY
      S.model_nm
ORDER BY
      S.model_nm;
raw_columns.gold_query_variant__최종GOLD쿼리v1:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분·공백 없이, N'...' 사용)
      ※ @ScName 특수 규칙:
         NULL  → SC 열 미표시 (전체 집계)
         'ALL' → SC 열 표시 + 전체 SC
         값     → SC 열 표시 + 해당 SC만
      ※ @MonthNumber: 지정한 월까지 1월부터 모두 표시
         예: '2' → 1,2월 행 출력 / NULL → 전체 월
      ※ 콤마 구분값에 공백 넣지 말 것 (예: N'값1,값2' O / N'값1, 값2' X)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]  ※ NULL/'ALL'/값
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 말)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   4. 월 상한: @MonthNumber 중 최대값 (NULL 이면 전체 월)
      ※ NULLIF로 빈 문자열 제거 → TRY_CAST('')=0 버그 방지
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @MaxMonth INT =
    (SELECT MAX(TRY_CAST(NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(value)), N'') AS INT))
     FROM STRING_SPLIT(ISNULL(@MonthNumber, N''), ','));
-- @MonthNumber가 NULL이면 @MaxMonth도 NULL → 전체 월

/* ============================================
   5. LIKE 매칭용 패딩 문자열 (TVF 제거용, 8623 방지)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @pYear    NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @Year      + ',';
DECLARE @pBrand   NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @Brand     + ',';
DECLARE @pDealer  NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @DealerNm  + ',';
DECLARE @pGroup   NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @GroupName + ',';
DECLARE @pDept    NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @DeptNm    + ',';
DECLARE @pActive  NVARCHAR(60)  = ',' + @ActiveYn  + ',';
DECLARE @pSc      NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @ScName    + ',';
DECLARE @pModel   NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @ModelNm   + ',';
DECLARE @pVariant NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @VariantNm + ',';
DECLARE @pMyCd    NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @MyCd      + ',';
DECLARE @pSfxCd   NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @SfxCd     + ',';
DECLARE @pExUsers NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @ExclUserIds + ',';

/* ============================================
   연도 | 월 | 브랜드 | 딜러 | 전시장 | 팀 | 재직여부 | (SC)
   | 모델 | 차종 | 연식 | SFX | sales_ytd
   ※ 1월 ~ @MaxMonth 월까지 행 출력, 각 월 행 = 연초~해당 월 말 YTD 누적
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 A: SC 열 없음 ---------- */
    ;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
            , CAL.MonthNumber                                   AS mn
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
              END                                               AS month_end
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
              END                                               AS prev_month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR @pYear LIKE N'%,' + CAST(CAL.[Year] AS NVARCHAR(10)) + N',%')
          AND (@MaxMonth IS NULL OR CAL.MonthNumber <= @MaxMonth)   -- ★ 1월~선택월 (NULL = 전체)
          AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthNumber
    )
    SELECT
          A.yr                                AS N'연도'
        , A.mn                                AS N'월'
        , U.BRAND                             AS N'브랜드'
        , D.dealer_nm                         AS N'딜러'
        , U.group_name                        AS N'전시장'
        , U.dept_nm                           AS N'팀'
        , U.active_yn                         AS N'재직여부'
        , M.model_nm                          AS N'모델'
        , V.variant_nm                        AS N'차종'
        , S.my_cd                             AS N'연식'
        , S.sfx_cd                            AS N'SFX'
        , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no)   AS [sales_ytd]
    FROM MonthAnchor A
    JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F   ON F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
                                          AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR @pExUsers NOT LIKE N'%,' + U.user_id + N',%')

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR @pBrand   LIKE N'%,' + U.BRAND      + N',%')
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR @pDealer  LIKE N'%,' + D.dealer_nm  + N',%')
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR @pGroup   LIKE N'%,' + U.group_name + N',%')
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR @pDept    LIKE N'%,' + U.dept_nm    + N',%')
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR @pActive  LIKE N'%,' + U.active_yn  + N',%')
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR @pModel   LIKE N'%,' + M.model_nm   + N',%')
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR @pVariant LIKE N'%,' + V.variant_nm + N',%')
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR @pMyCd    LIKE N'%,' + S.my_cd      + N',%')
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR @pSfxCd   LIKE N'%,' + S.sfx_cd     + N',%')
    GROUP BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , U.BRAND, D.dealer_nm, U.group_name, U.dept_nm, U.active_yn
        , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
    ORDER BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , U.BRAND, D.dealer_nm, U.group_name, U.dept_nm
        , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 B: SC 열 포함 ('ALL' = 전체 SC) ---------- */
    ;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
            , CAL.MonthNumber                                   AS mn
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
              END                                               AS month_end
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
              END                                               AS prev_month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR @pYear LIKE N'%,' + CAST(CAL.[Year] AS NVARCHAR(10)) + N',%')
          AND (@MaxMonth IS NULL OR CAL.MonthNumber <= @MaxMonth)   -- ★ 1월~선택월 (NULL = 전체)
          AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthNumber
    )
    SELECT
          A.yr                                AS N'연도'
        , A.mn                                AS N'월'
        , U.BRAND                             AS N'브랜드'
        , D.dealer_nm                         AS N'딜러'
        , U.group_name                        AS N'전시장'
        , U.dept_nm                           AS N'팀'
        , U.active_yn                         AS N'재직여부'
