        , U.name                              AS N'SC'
        , M.model_nm                          AS N'모델'
        , V.variant_nm                        AS N'차종'
        , S.my_cd                             AS N'연식'
        , S.sfx_cd                            AS N'SFX'
        , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no)   AS [sales_ytd]
    FROM MonthAnchor A
    JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F   ON F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
                                          AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR @pExUsers NOT LIKE N'%,' + U.user_id + N',%')

        /* ---- SC 필터 ('ALL' = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR @pSc LIKE N'%,' + U.name + N',%')

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR @pBrand   LIKE N'%,' + U.BRAND      + N',%')
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR @pDealer  LIKE N'%,' + D.dealer_nm  + N',%')
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR @pGroup   LIKE N'%,' + U.group_name + N',%')
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR @pDept    LIKE N'%,' + U.dept_nm    + N',%')
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR @pActive  LIKE N'%,' + U.active_yn  + N',%')
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR @pModel   LIKE N'%,' + M.model_nm   + N',%')
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR @pVariant LIKE N'%,' + V.variant_nm + N',%')
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR @pMyCd    LIKE N'%,' + S.my_cd      + N',%')
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR @pSfxCd   LIKE N'%,' + S.sfx_cd     + N',%')
    GROUP BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , U.BRAND, D.dealer_nm, U.group_name, U.dept_nm, U.active_yn, U.name
        , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
    ORDER BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , U.BRAND, D.dealer_nm, U.group_name, U.dept_nm, U.name
        , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd;
END

visual_name: 유형별 분포현황 - 등급, suffix 별 출고 연누적
value_label:
GRADE - ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[grade]
SFX - ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]
출고연누적 - 4. sales_ytd
dax_expression:
4. sales_ytd = 
CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[dlr_contract_no]) 
    , ALL('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS')
    , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt] >= DATE(YEAR(MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])), 1,1)
    , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt] <= MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])
    ,'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt] > EOMONTH(MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date]), -1) || ISBLANK('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt])
    )

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 달력/슬라이서 범위의 마지막 날짜)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   GRADE | SFX | sales_ytd
   -----------------------------------------------
   sales_ytd = DISTINCTCOUNT(dlr_contract_no), ALL(Calendar)
     + last_retail_sales_dt ∈ [연초, MAX(Date)]
     + cancel_dt > EOMONTH(MAX(Date),-1) OR cancel_dt IS NULL
   ※ MAX(Date) = (Year/MonthNumber 슬라이서로 걸러진) 달력의 마지막 날짜
   ============================================ */
;WITH YearAnchor AS (
    /* 연도별 기준시점: 슬라이서(@Year, @MonthNumber) 컨텍스트 안의 MAX(Date) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
        , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
               THEN @AsOfDate
               ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
          END                                               AS period_end
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
               THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
               ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
          END                                               AS prev_month_end
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year        IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@MonthNumber IS NULL OR CAL.MonthNumber IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MonthNumber, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year]
)
SELECT
      S.grade                             AS N'GRADE'
    , S.sfx_cd                            AS N'SFX'
    , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no)   AS N'출고연누적'
FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC           S   ON F.cn_vehic_key   = S.spec_key
JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
JOIN YearAnchor                    A   ON CAL.[Year]       = A.yr
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key      = U.sc_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key     = D.dealer_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key        = V.var_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key      = M.mdl_key
WHERE 1 = 1
    /* ---- 출고일 YTD 범위: 연초 ~ 기준시점 (ALL(Calendar) + 범위 재현) ---- */
    AND F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
    AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.period_end

    /* ---- 기준시점 전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소 ---- */
    AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

    /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
    AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
    AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                        AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
    AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

    /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
    AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
    AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
    AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
    AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
    AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
    AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
    AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
    AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
    AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
GROUP BY
      S.grade
    , S.sfx_cd
ORDER BY
      COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no) desc;
raw_columns.gold_query_variant__최종GOLD쿼리v1:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분·공백 없이, N'...' 사용)
      ※ @ScName 특수 규칙:
         NULL  → SC 열 미표시 (전체 집계)
         'ALL' → SC 열 표시 + 전체 SC
         값     → SC 열 표시 + 해당 SC만
      ※ @MonthNumber: 지정한 월까지 1월부터 모두 표시
         예: '2' → 1,2월 행 출력 / NULL → 전체 월
      ※ 콤마 구분값에 공백 넣지 말 것 (예: N'값1,값2' O / N'값1, 값2' X)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]  ※ NULL/'ALL'/값
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 말)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   4. 월 상한: @MonthNumber 중 최대값 (NULL 이면 전체 월)
      ※ NULLIF로 빈 문자열 제거 → TRY_CAST('')=0 버그 방지
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @MaxMonth INT =
    (SELECT MAX(TRY_CAST(NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(value)), N'') AS INT))
     FROM STRING_SPLIT(ISNULL(@MonthNumber, N''), ','));
-- @MonthNumber가 NULL이면 @MaxMonth도 NULL → 전체 월

/* ============================================
   5. LIKE 매칭용 패딩 문자열 (TVF 제거용, 8623 방지)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @pYear    NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @Year        + ',';
DECLARE @pBrand   NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @Brand       + ',';
DECLARE @pDealer  NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @DealerNm    + ',';
DECLARE @pGroup   NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @GroupName   + ',';
DECLARE @pDept    NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @DeptNm      + ',';
DECLARE @pActive  NVARCHAR(60)  = ',' + @ActiveYn    + ',';
DECLARE @pSc      NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @ScName      + ',';
DECLARE @pModel   NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @ModelNm     + ',';
DECLARE @pVariant NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @VariantNm   + ',';
DECLARE @pMyCd    NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @MyCd        + ',';
DECLARE @pSfxCd   NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @SfxCd       + ',';
DECLARE @pExUsers NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @ExclUserIds + ',';

/* ============================================
   연도 | 월 | 브랜드 | 딜러 | 전시장 | 팀 | 재직여부 | (SC)
   | 모델 | 차종 | 연식 | SFX | GRADE | 출고연누적
   ※ 1월 ~ @MaxMonth 월까지 행 출력, 각 월 행 = 연초~해당 월 말 YTD 누적
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 A: SC 열 없음 ---------- */
    ;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
            , CAL.MonthNumber                                   AS mn
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
              END                                               AS month_end
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
              END                                               AS prev_month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR @pYear LIKE N'%,' + CAST(CAL.[Year] AS NVARCHAR(10)) + N',%')
          AND (@MaxMonth IS NULL OR CAL.MonthNumber <= @MaxMonth)   -- ★ 1월~선택월 (NULL = 전체)
          AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthNumber
    )
    SELECT
          A.yr                                AS N'연도'
        , A.mn                                AS N'월'
        , U.BRAND                             AS N'브랜드'
        , D.dealer_nm                         AS N'딜러'
        , U.group_name                        AS N'전시장'
        , U.dept_nm                           AS N'팀'
        , U.active_yn                         AS N'재직여부'
        , M.model_nm                          AS N'모델'
        , V.variant_nm                        AS N'차종'
        , S.my_cd                             AS N'연식'
        , S.sfx_cd                            AS N'SFX'
        , S.grade                             AS N'GRADE'
        , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no)   AS N'출고연누적'
    FROM MonthAnchor A
    JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F   ON F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
                                          AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end
    JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC           S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR @pExUsers NOT LIKE N'%,' + U.user_id + N',%')

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR @pBrand   LIKE N'%,' + U.BRAND      + N',%')
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR @pDealer  LIKE N'%,' + D.dealer_nm  + N',%')
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR @pGroup   LIKE N'%,' + U.group_name + N',%')
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR @pDept    LIKE N'%,' + U.dept_nm    + N',%')
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR @pActive  LIKE N'%,' + U.active_yn  + N',%')
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR @pModel   LIKE N'%,' + M.model_nm   + N',%')
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR @pVariant LIKE N'%,' + V.variant_nm + N',%')
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR @pMyCd    LIKE N'%,' + S.my_cd      + N',%')
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR @pSfxCd   LIKE N'%,' + S.sfx_cd     + N',%')
    GROUP BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , U.BRAND, D.dealer_nm, U.group_name, U.dept_nm, U.active_yn
        , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd, S.grade
    ORDER BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no) DESC;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 B: SC 열 포함 ('ALL' = 전체 SC) ---------- */
    ;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
            , CAL.MonthNumber                                   AS mn
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
              END                                               AS month_end
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
              END                                               AS prev_month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR @pYear LIKE N'%,' + CAST(CAL.[Year] AS NVARCHAR(10)) + N',%')
          AND (@MaxMonth IS NULL OR CAL.MonthNumber <= @MaxMonth)   -- ★ 1월~선택월 (NULL = 전체)
          AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthNumber
    )
    SELECT
          A.yr                                AS N'연도'
        , A.mn                                AS N'월'
        , U.BRAND                             AS N'브랜드'
        , D.dealer_nm                         AS N'딜러'
        , U.group_name                        AS N'전시장'
        , U.dept_nm                           AS N'팀'
        , U.active_yn                         AS N'재직여부'
        , U.name                              AS N'SC'
        , M.model_nm                          AS N'모델'
        , V.variant_nm                        AS N'차종'
        , S.my_cd                             AS N'연식'
        , S.sfx_cd                            AS N'SFX'
        , S.grade                             AS N'GRADE'
        , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no)   AS N'출고연누적'
    FROM MonthAnchor A
    JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F   ON F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
                                          AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end
    JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC           S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR @pExUsers NOT LIKE N'%,' + U.user_id + N',%')

        /* ---- SC 필터 ('ALL' = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR @pSc LIKE N'%,' + U.name + N',%')

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR @pBrand   LIKE N'%,' + U.BRAND      + N',%')
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR @pDealer  LIKE N'%,' + D.dealer_nm  + N',%')
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR @pGroup   LIKE N'%,' + U.group_name + N',%')
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR @pDept    LIKE N'%,' + U.dept_nm    + N',%')
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR @pActive  LIKE N'%,' + U.active_yn  + N',%')
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR @pModel   LIKE N'%,' + M.model_nm   + N',%')
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR @pVariant LIKE N'%,' + V.variant_nm + N',%')
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR @pMyCd    LIKE N'%,' + S.my_cd      + N',%')
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR @pSfxCd   LIKE N'%,' + S.sfx_cd     + N',%')
    GROUP BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , U.BRAND, D.dealer_nm, U.group_name, U.dept_nm, U.active_yn, U.name
        , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd, S.grade
    ORDER BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no) DESC;
END

source.visual_name: 유형별 분포현황 - 등급, suffix 별 출고 연누적

value_label:
자사금융여부 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[own_pay_flag]
지불유형 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[pay_type]
출고 연누적 - 4. sales_ytd
dax_expression:
4. sales_ytd = 
CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[dlr_contract_no]) 
    , ALL('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS')
    , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt] >= DATE(YEAR(MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])), 1,1)
    , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt] <= MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])
    ,'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt] > EOMONTH(MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date]), -1) || ISBLANK('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt])
    )

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = '2026';  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber NVARCHAR(200) = '1';  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 달력/슬라이서 범위의 마지막 날짜)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   자사금융여부 | 지불유형 | sales_ytd
   -----------------------------------------------
   sales_ytd = DISTINCTCOUNT(dlr_contract_no), ALL(Calendar)
     + last_retail_sales_dt ∈ [연초, MAX(Date)]
     + cancel_dt > EOMONTH(MAX(Date),-1) OR cancel_dt IS NULL
   ※ MAX(Date) = (Year/MonthNumber 슬라이서로 걸러진) 달력의 마지막 날짜
   ============================================ */
;WITH YearAnchor AS (
    /* 연도별 기준시점: 슬라이서(@Year, @MonthNumber) 컨텍스트 안의 MAX(Date) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
        , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
               THEN @AsOfDate
               ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
          END                                               AS period_end
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
               THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
               ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
          END                                               AS prev_month_end
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year        IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@MonthNumber IS NULL OR CAL.MonthNumber IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MonthNumber, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year]
)
SELECT
      F.own_pay_flag                      AS N'자사금융여부'
    , F.pay_type                          AS N'지불유형'
    , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no)   AS N'출고연누적'
FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
JOIN YearAnchor                    A   ON CAL.[Year]       = A.yr
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key      = U.sc_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key     = D.dealer_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key   = S.spec_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key        = V.var_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key      = M.mdl_key
WHERE 1 = 1
    /* ---- 출고일 YTD 범위: 연초 ~ 기준시점 (ALL(Calendar) + 범위 재현) ---- */
    AND F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
    AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.period_end

    /* ---- 기준시점 전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소 ---- */
    AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

    /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
    AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
    AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                        AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
    AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

    /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
    AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
    AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
    AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
    AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
    AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
    AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
    AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
    AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
    AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
GROUP BY
      F.own_pay_flag
    , F.pay_type
ORDER BY
      COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no) desc;
raw_columns.gold_query_variant__최종GOLD쿼리v1:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분·공백 없이, N'...' 사용)
      ※ @ScName 특수 규칙:
         NULL  → SC 열 미표시 (전체 집계)
         'ALL' → SC 열 표시 + 전체 SC
         값     → SC 열 표시 + 해당 SC만
      ※ @MonthNumber: 지정한 월까지 1월부터 모두 표시
         예: '2' → 1,2월 행 출력 / NULL → 전체 월
      ※ 콤마 구분값에 공백 넣지 말 것 (예: N'값1,값2' O / N'값1, 값2' X)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]  ※ NULL/'ALL'/값
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 말)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   4. 월 상한: @MonthNumber 중 최대값 (NULL 이면 전체 월)
      ※ NULLIF로 빈 문자열 제거 → TRY_CAST('')=0 버그 방지
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @MaxMonth INT =
    (SELECT MAX(TRY_CAST(NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(value)), N'') AS INT))
     FROM STRING_SPLIT(ISNULL(@MonthNumber, N''), ','));
-- @MonthNumber가 NULL이면 @MaxMonth도 NULL → 전체 월

/* ============================================
   5. LIKE 매칭용 패딩 문자열 (TVF 제거용, 8623 방지)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @pYear    NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @Year        + ',';
DECLARE @pBrand   NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @Brand       + ',';
DECLARE @pDealer  NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @DealerNm    + ',';
DECLARE @pGroup   NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @GroupName   + ',';
DECLARE @pDept    NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @DeptNm      + ',';
DECLARE @pActive  NVARCHAR(60)  = ',' + @ActiveYn    + ',';
DECLARE @pSc      NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @ScName      + ',';
DECLARE @pModel   NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @ModelNm     + ',';
DECLARE @pVariant NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @VariantNm   + ',';
DECLARE @pMyCd    NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @MyCd        + ',';
DECLARE @pSfxCd   NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @SfxCd       + ',';
DECLARE @pExUsers NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @ExclUserIds + ',';

/* ============================================
   연도 | 월 | 브랜드 | 딜러 | 전시장 | 팀 | 재직여부 | (SC)
   | 모델 | 차종 | 연식 | SFX | 자사금융여부 | 지불유형 | 출고연누적
   ※ 1월 ~ @MaxMonth 월까지 행 출력, 각 월 행 = 연초~해당 월 말 YTD 누적
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 A: SC 열 없음 ---------- */
    ;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
            , CAL.MonthNumber                                   AS mn
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
              END                                               AS month_end
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
              END                                               AS prev_month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR @pYear LIKE N'%,' + CAST(CAL.[Year] AS NVARCHAR(10)) + N',%')
          AND (@MaxMonth IS NULL OR CAL.MonthNumber <= @MaxMonth)   -- ★ 1월~선택월 (NULL = 전체)
          AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthNumber
    )
    SELECT
          A.yr                                AS N'연도'
        , A.mn                                AS N'월'
        , U.BRAND                             AS N'브랜드'
        , D.dealer_nm                         AS N'딜러'
        , U.group_name                        AS N'전시장'
        , U.dept_nm                           AS N'팀'
        , U.active_yn                         AS N'재직여부'
        , M.model_nm                          AS N'모델'
        , V.variant_nm                        AS N'차종'
        , S.my_cd                             AS N'연식'
        , S.sfx_cd                            AS N'SFX'
        , F.own_pay_flag                      AS N'자사금융여부'
        , F.pay_type                          AS N'지불유형'
        , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no)   AS N'출고연누적'
    FROM MonthAnchor A
    JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F   ON F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
                                          AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR @pExUsers NOT LIKE N'%,' + U.user_id + N',%')

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR @pBrand   LIKE N'%,' + U.BRAND      + N',%')
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR @pDealer  LIKE N'%,' + D.dealer_nm  + N',%')
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR @pGroup   LIKE N'%,' + U.group_name + N',%')
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR @pDept    LIKE N'%,' + U.dept_nm    + N',%')
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR @pActive  LIKE N'%,' + U.active_yn  + N',%')
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR @pModel   LIKE N'%,' + M.model_nm   + N',%')
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR @pVariant LIKE N'%,' + V.variant_nm + N',%')
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR @pMyCd    LIKE N'%,' + S.my_cd      + N',%')
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR @pSfxCd   LIKE N'%,' + S.sfx_cd     + N',%')
    GROUP BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , U.BRAND, D.dealer_nm, U.group_name, U.dept_nm, U.active_yn
        , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
        , F.own_pay_flag, F.pay_type
    ORDER BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no) DESC;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 B: SC 열 포함 ('ALL' = 전체 SC) ---------- */
    ;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
            , CAL.MonthNumber                                   AS mn
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
              END                                               AS month_end
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
              END                                               AS prev_month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR @pYear LIKE N'%,' + CAST(CAL.[Year] AS NVARCHAR(10)) + N',%')
          AND (@MaxMonth IS NULL OR CAL.MonthNumber <= @MaxMonth)   -- ★ 1월~선택월 (NULL = 전체)
          AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthNumber
    )
    SELECT
          A.yr                                AS N'연도'
        , A.mn                                AS N'월'
        , U.BRAND                             AS N'브랜드'
        , D.dealer_nm                         AS N'딜러'
        , U.group_name                        AS N'전시장'
        , U.dept_nm                           AS N'팀'
        , U.active_yn                         AS N'재직여부'
        , U.name                              AS N'SC'
        , M.model_nm                          AS N'모델'
        , V.variant_nm                        AS N'차종'
        , S.my_cd                             AS N'연식'
        , S.sfx_cd                            AS N'SFX'
        , F.own_pay_flag                      AS N'자사금융여부'
        , F.pay_type                          AS N'지불유형'
        , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no)   AS N'출고연누적'
    FROM MonthAnchor A
    JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F   ON F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
                                          AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR @pExUsers NOT LIKE N'%,' + U.user_id + N',%')

        /* ---- SC 필터 ('ALL' = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR @pSc LIKE N'%,' + U.name + N',%')

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR @pBrand   LIKE N'%,' + U.BRAND      + N',%')
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR @pDealer  LIKE N'%,' + D.dealer_nm  + N',%')
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR @pGroup   LIKE N'%,' + U.group_name + N',%')
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR @pDept    LIKE N'%,' + U.dept_nm    + N',%')
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR @pActive  LIKE N'%,' + U.active_yn  + N',%')
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR @pModel   LIKE N'%,' + M.model_nm   + N',%')
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR @pVariant LIKE N'%,' + V.variant_nm + N',%')
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR @pMyCd    LIKE N'%,' + S.my_cd      + N',%')
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR @pSfxCd   LIKE N'%,' + S.sfx_cd     + N',%')
    GROUP BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , U.BRAND, D.dealer_nm, U.group_name, U.dept_nm, U.active_yn, U.name
        , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
        , F.own_pay_flag, F.pay_type
    ORDER BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no) DESC;
END

visual_name: 출고이력(고객명, 딜러계약번호, 계약일자, 출고일자, 리드타임(일), Model, SFX, 재구매 여부, 자사금융 여부, 지불유형 여부, 출고연누적)
value_label:
계약번호 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[dlr_contract_no], 
고객명 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[cust_nm], 
계약일자 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[contract_dt], 
출고일자 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[last_retail_sales_dt], 
리드타임(일) - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[lead_time], 
Model - ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[model_nm], 
SFX - ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd], 
재구매 여부 - ktws DIM_REPURC_SALES_TYPE[repurc_grp1], 
자사금융 여부 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[own_pay_flag], 
지불유형 여부 - ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[pay_type]
출고 연누적 - 4. sales_ytd
dax_expression:
4. sales_ytd = 
CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[dlr_contract_no]) 
    , ALL('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS')
    , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt] >= DATE(YEAR(MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])), 1,1)
    , 'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[last_retail_sales_dt] <= MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])
    ,'ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt] > EOMONTH(MAX('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date]), -1) || ISBLANK('ktws FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS'[cancel_dt])
    )

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = 2026;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber NVARCHAR(200) = 1;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 달력/슬라이서 범위의 마지막 날짜)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   판매 상세 목록 (sales_ytd 기준)
   고객명 | 딜러계약번호 | 계약일자 | 출고일자 | 리드타임(일)
   | Model | SFX | 재구매 여부 | 자사금융 여부 | 지불유형 | sales_ytd
   -----------------------------------------------
   sales_ytd = DISTINCTCOUNT(dlr_contract_no), ALL(Calendar)
     + last_retail_sales_dt ∈ [연초, MAX(Date)]
     + cancel_dt > EOMONTH(MAX(Date),-1) OR cancel_dt IS NULL
   ※ MAX(Date) = (Year/MonthNumber 슬라이서로 걸러진) 달력 마지막 날짜
   ※ 계약번호 단위 상세 행에서는 DISTINCTCOUNT = 1
   ============================================ */
;WITH YearAnchor AS (
    /* 연도별 기준시점: 슬라이서(@Year, @MonthNumber) 컨텍스트 안의 MAX(Date) */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
        , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
               THEN @AsOfDate
               ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
          END                                               AS period_end
        , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
               THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
               ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
          END                                               AS prev_month_end
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
    WHERE (@Year        IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
      AND (@MonthNumber IS NULL OR CAL.MonthNumber IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MonthNumber, ',')))
    GROUP BY CAL.[Year]
)
SELECT
      F.cust_nm                           AS N'고객명'
    , F.dlr_contract_no                   AS N'딜러계약번호'
    , F.contract_dt                       AS N'계약일자'
    , F.last_retail_sales_dt              AS N'출고일자'
    , F.lead_time                         AS N'리드타임(일)'
    , S.model_nm                          AS N'Model'
    , S.sfx_cd                            AS N'SFX'
    , R.repurc_grp1                       AS N'재구매 여부'
    , F.own_pay_flag                      AS N'자사금융 여부'
    , F.pay_type                          AS N'지불유형'
    , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no)   AS [sales_ytd]   -- 상세 행에서는 1
FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
JOIN YearAnchor                    A   ON CAL.[Year]       = A.yr
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key      = U.sc_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key     = D.dealer_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key   = S.spec_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key        = V.var_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key      = M.mdl_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_REPURC_SALES_TYPE R ON F.sales_tp_key   = R.sales_tp_key
WHERE 1 = 1
    /* ---- 출고일 YTD 범위: 연초 ~ 기준시점 (ALL(Calendar) + 범위 재현) ---- */
    AND F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
    AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.period_end

    /* ---- 기준시점 전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소 ---- */
    AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

    /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
    AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
    AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                        AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
    AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

    /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
    AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
    AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
    AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
    AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
    AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
    AND (@ScName    IS NULL OR U.name       IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
    AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
    AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
    AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
    AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
GROUP BY
      F.cust_nm
    , F.dlr_contract_no
    , F.contract_dt
    , F.last_retail_sales_dt
    , F.lead_time
    , S.model_nm
    , S.sfx_cd
    , R.repurc_grp1
    , F.own_pay_flag
    , F.pay_type
ORDER BY
      F.contract_dt;
raw_columns.gold_query_variant__최종GOLD쿼리v1:
/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분·공백 없이, N'...' 사용)
      ※ @ScName: NULL → SC 열 미표시 / 'ALL' → 표시+전체 / 값 → 표시+해당 SC
      ※ @MonthNumber: 지정 월까지 1월부터 모두 표시 (예: '2' → 1,2월 / NULL → 전체 월)
      ※ 콤마 구분값에 공백 넣지 말 것 (예: N'값1,값2' O / N'값1, 값2' X)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @MonthNumber NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]  ※ NULL/'ALL'/값
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 말)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   4. 월 상한: @MonthNumber 중 최대값 (NULL 이면 전체 월)
      ※ NULLIF로 빈 문자열 제거 → TRY_CAST('')=0 버그 방지
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @MaxMonth INT =
    (SELECT MAX(TRY_CAST(NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(value)), N'') AS INT))
     FROM STRING_SPLIT(ISNULL(@MonthNumber, N''), ','));
-- @MonthNumber가 NULL이면 @MaxMonth도 NULL → 전체 월

/* ============================================
   5. LIKE 매칭용 패딩 문자열 (TVF 제거용, 8623 방지)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @pYear    NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @Year        + ',';
DECLARE @pBrand   NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @Brand       + ',';
DECLARE @pDealer  NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @DealerNm    + ',';
DECLARE @pGroup   NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @GroupName   + ',';
DECLARE @pDept    NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @DeptNm      + ',';
DECLARE @pActive  NVARCHAR(60)  = ',' + @ActiveYn    + ',';
DECLARE @pSc      NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @ScName      + ',';
DECLARE @pModel   NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @ModelNm     + ',';
DECLARE @pVariant NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @VariantNm   + ',';
DECLARE @pMyCd    NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @MyCd        + ',';
DECLARE @pSfxCd   NVARCHAR(210) = ',' + @SfxCd       + ',';
DECLARE @pExUsers NVARCHAR(510) = ',' + @ExclUserIds + ',';

/* ============================================
   판매 상세 목록 (sales_ytd 기준, 월별 YTD 반복)
   연도 | 월 | 브랜드 | 딜러 | 전시장 | 팀 | 재직여부 | (SC) | 차종 | 연식
   | 고객명 | 딜러계약번호 | 계약일자 | 출고일자 | 리드타임(일)
   | Model | SFX | 재구매 여부 | 자사금융 여부 | 지불유형 | sales_ytd
   ※ 각 월 행 = 그 월 말 기준 YTD → 출고월 이후 월들에 계약이 반복 표시됨
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 A: SC 열 없음 ---------- */
    ;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
            , CAL.MonthNumber                                   AS mn
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
              END                                               AS month_end
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
              END                                               AS prev_month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR @pYear LIKE N'%,' + CAST(CAL.[Year] AS NVARCHAR(10)) + N',%')
          AND (@MaxMonth IS NULL OR CAL.MonthNumber <= @MaxMonth)   -- ★ 1월~선택월 (NULL = 전체)
          AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthNumber
    )
    SELECT
          A.yr                     AS N'연도'
        , A.mn                     AS N'월'
        , U.BRAND                  AS N'브랜드'
        , D.dealer_nm              AS N'딜러'
        , U.group_name             AS N'전시장'
        , U.dept_nm                AS N'팀'
        , U.active_yn              AS N'재직여부'
        , V.variant_nm             AS N'차종'
        , S.my_cd                  AS N'연식'
        , F.cust_nm                AS N'고객명'
        , F.dlr_contract_no        AS N'딜러계약번호'
        , F.contract_dt            AS N'계약일자'
        , F.last_retail_sales_dt   AS N'출고일자'
        , F.lead_time              AS N'리드타임(일)'
        , S.model_nm               AS N'Model'
        , S.sfx_cd                 AS N'SFX'
        , R.repurc_grp1            AS N'재구매 여부'
        , F.own_pay_flag           AS N'자사금융 여부'
        , F.pay_type               AS N'지불유형'
        , 1                        AS [sales_ytd]   -- 상세 행에서는 항상 1
    FROM MonthAnchor A
    JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F   ON F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
                                          AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_REPURC_SALES_TYPE R ON F.sales_tp_key = R.sales_tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR @pExUsers NOT LIKE N'%,' + U.user_id + N',%')

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR @pBrand   LIKE N'%,' + U.BRAND      + N',%')
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR @pDealer  LIKE N'%,' + D.dealer_nm  + N',%')
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR @pGroup   LIKE N'%,' + U.group_name + N',%')
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR @pDept    LIKE N'%,' + U.dept_nm    + N',%')
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR @pActive  LIKE N'%,' + U.active_yn  + N',%')
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR @pModel   LIKE N'%,' + M.model_nm   + N',%')
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR @pVariant LIKE N'%,' + V.variant_nm + N',%')
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR @pMyCd    LIKE N'%,' + S.my_cd      + N',%')
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR @pSfxCd   LIKE N'%,' + S.sfx_cd     + N',%')
    ORDER BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , F.contract_dt
        , F.dlr_contract_no;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 B: SC 열 포함 ('ALL' = 전체 SC) ---------- */
    ;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
            , CAL.MonthNumber                                   AS mn
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
              END                                               AS month_end
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
              END                                               AS prev_month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR @pYear LIKE N'%,' + CAST(CAL.[Year] AS NVARCHAR(10)) + N',%')
          AND (@MaxMonth IS NULL OR CAL.MonthNumber <= @MaxMonth)   -- ★ 1월~선택월 (NULL = 전체)
          AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthNumber
    )
    SELECT
          A.yr                     AS N'연도'
        , A.mn                     AS N'월'
        , U.BRAND                  AS N'브랜드'
        , D.dealer_nm              AS N'딜러'
        , U.group_name             AS N'전시장'
        , U.dept_nm                AS N'팀'
        , U.active_yn              AS N'재직여부'
        , U.name                   AS N'SC'
        , V.variant_nm             AS N'차종'
        , S.my_cd                  AS N'연식'
        , F.cust_nm                AS N'고객명'
        , F.dlr_contract_no        AS N'딜러계약번호'
        , F.contract_dt            AS N'계약일자'
        , F.last_retail_sales_dt   AS N'출고일자'
        , F.lead_time              AS N'리드타임(일)'
        , S.model_nm               AS N'Model'
        , S.sfx_cd                 AS N'SFX'
        , R.repurc_grp1            AS N'재구매 여부'
        , F.own_pay_flag           AS N'자사금융 여부'
        , F.pay_type               AS N'지불유형'
        , 1                        AS [sales_ytd]   -- 상세 행에서는 항상 1
    FROM MonthAnchor A
    JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F   ON F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
                                          AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_REPURC_SALES_TYPE R ON F.sales_tp_key = R.sales_tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR @pExUsers NOT LIKE N'%,' + U.user_id + N',%')

        /* ---- SC 필터 ('ALL' = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR @pSc LIKE N'%,' + U.name + N',%')

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR @pBrand   LIKE N'%,' + U.BRAND      + N',%')
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR @pDealer  LIKE N'%,' + D.dealer_nm  + N',%')
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR @pGroup   LIKE N'%,' + U.group_name + N',%')
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR @pDept    LIKE N'%,' + U.dept_nm    + N',%')
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR @pActive  LIKE N'%,' + U.active_yn  + N',%')
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR @pModel   LIKE N'%,' + M.model_nm   + N',%')
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR @pVariant LIKE N'%,' + V.variant_nm + N',%')
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR @pMyCd    LIKE N'%,' + S.my_cd      + N',%')
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR @pSfxCd   LIKE N'%,' + S.sfx_cd     + N',%')
    ORDER BY
          A.yr, A.mn
        , F.contract_dt
        , F.dlr_contract_no;
END

source.visual_name: 출고이력(고객명, 딜러계약번호, 계약일자, 출고일자, 리드타임(일), Model, SFX, 재구매 여부, 자사금융 여부, 지불유형 여부, 출고연누적)

related_measures: ▪3. cntrct_funnel_(mtd_target)_sc — SC 필터 시 계약 목표
coalesce — SC 필터 시 출고 목표

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__최종GOLD쿼리v1:
/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   [출고 현황] 브랜드>딜러>전시장>팀>SC × 구분(class) × (MTD / YTD / LM)
   ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   컬럼 : 브랜드/딜러/전시장/팀/SC / 구분 / 출고MTD / 출고YTD / 출고LM
   행   : SC × 구분(class) 4행 = Total / Hunting / Farming / Referral
   값   : 출고 = FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[cnt] 합 (실판매 last_retail_sales_dt 기준)

   ■ DAX 이식 ([4. sales_*_class] → SWITCH(purc_class) 하위 measure들) :
     · 구분(class) 조건 (DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE) :
         - Total    : 조건 없음
         - Hunting  : tp_grp_1 = '기회창출'
         - Farming  : tp_grp_1 = '관계형성'
         - Referral : tp_cd    = 'P120'
     · 기간 (last_retail_sales_dt 범위) :
         - MTD : 그 달 1일 ~ @ref_date(말일)              / 취소: cancel_dt > EOMONTH(lrsd,0) or NULL
         - YTD : 올해 1/1 ~ @ref_date                      / 취소: cancel_dt > EOMONTH(@ref_date,-1) or NULL
         - LM  : 전월 1일 ~ 전월 말일                       / 취소: cancel_dt > EOMONTH(lrsd,-1) or NULL
     · 공통 : 취소 안 된 것(cancel_dt 조건) + last_retail_sales_dt 범위.
     ※ 원본 DAX상 LM-Total만 상한이 '기준일 일자에 맞춘 전월 동일일자'로 특이하나,
        여기선 class 일관성을 위해 LM=전월 전체(말일)로 통일. (원본 LM-Total 특수식이 필요하면 별도 처리)
   ■ 기준 : @year/@month → @ref_date=그 달 말일. (일 슬라이서 없음, 월단위)
   ■ 제외(3) : 창구SC / 고객지원팀·TOYOTA YM / user_id 목록
   ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── 기간 ── */
DECLARE @year  INT = 2026;
DECLARE @month INT = 4;
DECLARE @mon_start DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@year,@month,1);
DECLARE @ref_date  DATE = EOMONTH(@mon_start);            -- 그 달 말일
DECLARE @ytd_start DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@year,1,1);       -- 올해 1/1
DECLARE @lm_start  DATE = DATEADD(DAY,1,EOMONTH(@mon_start,-2));  -- 전월 1일
DECLARE @lm_end    DATE = EOMONTH(@mon_start,-1);         -- 전월 말일

/* ── 슬라이서 (NULL=모두, 콤마 다중) ── */
DECLARE @brand       NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @dealer_nm   NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @group_name  NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @dept_nm     NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @active_yn   NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'재직';
DECLARE @sc_name     NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'강원';

/* ── 제외 규칙 ── */
DECLARE @exclude_facade NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @exclude_dept   NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @exclude_users  NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

;WITH
/* ── 슬라이서·제외 통과 SC (계층 컬럼 포함) ── */
elig_user AS (
    SELECT u.sc_key, u.BRAND AS brand_nm, dlr.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm, u.[name] AS sc_name
    FROM   ktws.DIM_MNG_USER u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER dlr ON u.dealer_key = dlr.dealer_key
    WHERE  ISNULL(u.facade_sc_yn,N'') <> @exclude_facade
      AND (@brand      IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@brand,     N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.BRAND))
      AND (@dealer_nm  IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dealer_nm, N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = dlr.dealer_nm))
      AND (@group_name IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@group_name,N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.group_name))
      AND (@dept_nm    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dept_nm,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.dept_nm))
      AND (@active_yn  IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@active_yn, N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.active_yn))
      AND (@sc_name    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@sc_name,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.name))
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_dept,',')  s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.dept_nm)
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_users,',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.user_id)
),

/* ── 계약행 + 유형 class 태깅 (실판매된 계약만: last_retail_sales_dt 있음) ──
      class : Total은 전건, Hunting/Farming/Referral은 유형조건 매칭 시 1 ── */
base AS (
    SELECT c.cn_sc_key AS sc_key, c.cnt, c.last_retail_sales_dt, c.cancel_dt,
           t.tp_grp_1, t.tp_cd
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS c
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE t ON c.tp_key = t.tp_key
    JOIN elig_user eu ON c.cn_sc_key = eu.sc_key
    WHERE c.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL
),

/* ── class 그리드 (SC × 4 class) : elig SC 전체에 대해 4행 생성 ── */
cls AS (
    SELECT * FROM (VALUES (N'출고현황',0),(N'기회창출',1),(N'관계형성',2),(N'소개',3)) v(class_nm, class_ord)
),
sccls AS (
    SELECT eu.sc_key, c.class_nm, c.class_ord
    FROM elig_user eu CROSS JOIN cls c
),

/* ── SC×class 별 MTD/YTD/LM 합 ── */
agg AS (
    SELECT b.sc_key,
           cls.class_nm, cls.class_ord,
           /* MTD : 그 달, 취소 cancel_dt>EOMONTH(lrsd,0) or NULL */
           SUM(CASE WHEN b.last_retail_sales_dt >= @mon_start AND b.last_retail_sales_dt <= @ref_date
                     AND (b.cancel_dt IS NULL OR b.cancel_dt > EOMONTH(b.last_retail_sales_dt,0))
                    THEN b.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS mtd,
           /* YTD : 올해 1/1~기준일, 취소 cancel_dt>EOMONTH(@ref_date,-1) or NULL */
           SUM(CASE WHEN b.last_retail_sales_dt >= @ytd_start AND b.last_retail_sales_dt <= @ref_date
                     AND (b.cancel_dt IS NULL OR b.cancel_dt > EOMONTH(@ref_date,-1))
                    THEN b.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS ytd,
           /* LM : 전월 전체, 취소 cancel_dt>EOMONTH(lrsd,-1) or NULL */
           SUM(CASE WHEN b.last_retail_sales_dt >= @lm_start AND b.last_retail_sales_dt <= @lm_end
                     AND (b.cancel_dt IS NULL OR b.cancel_dt > EOMONTH(b.last_retail_sales_dt,-1))
                    THEN b.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS lm
    FROM base b
    JOIN cls ON (cls.class_nm = N'출고현황' AND b.tp_grp_1 IN (N'기회창출', N'관계형성'))  -- 소개 제외 합
             OR (cls.class_nm = N'기회창출' AND b.tp_grp_1 = N'기회창출')
             OR (cls.class_nm = N'관계형성' AND b.tp_grp_1 = N'관계형성')
             OR (cls.class_nm = N'소개'     AND b.tp_cd    = N'P120')
    GROUP BY b.sc_key, cls.class_nm, cls.class_ord
)

/* ── 최종 : SC×class 4행, 값 없는 class도 0으로 표시 ── */
SELECT
    eu.brand_nm   AS [브랜드],
    eu.dealer_nm  AS [딜러],
    eu.group_name AS [전시장],
    eu.dept_nm    AS [팀],
    eu.sc_name    AS [SC],
    sc.class_nm   AS [구분],
    CAST(ISNULL(a.mtd,0) AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS [출고MTD],
    CAST(ISNULL(a.ytd,0) AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS [출고YTD],
    CAST(ISNULL(a.lm,0)  AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS [출고LM]
FROM sccls sc
JOIN      elig_user eu ON eu.sc_key = sc.sc_key
LEFT JOIN agg a ON a.sc_key = sc.sc_key AND a.class_nm = sc.class_nm
ORDER BY eu.brand_nm, eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.sc_name, sc.class_ord;

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   [SC 카드] 프로필 + 판매 진행률(계약/출고)  — 브랜드>딜러>전시장>팀>SC 계층
   ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   컬럼 : 브랜드/딜러/전시장/팀/SC / 이름/소속팀/근속년수/나이
          / 계약/계약목표/계약진행률 / 출고/출고목표/출고진행률
   ■ 시점 2개 (섞임 주의) :
     · 프로필(근속년수·나이) = 오늘(GETDATE). 연·월과 무관 (사람의 현재 속성).
     · 게이지(계약·출고)     = 지정 @year/@month 의 그 달 전체(1일~말일). TOTALMTD 월단위.
   ■ DAX 이식 :
     · 근속년수 [sc_yos] : 오늘 기준 만 근속(월/일 비교, 미달 시 -1). 없으면 0.
     · 나이     [sc_age] : YEAR(오늘)-YEAR(birth_dt). 없으면 공백.
     · 계약값   [3. cntrct_mtd_coalesce]  = COALESCE(TOTALMTD(SUM(FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[cnt])),0)
     · 계약목표 [3. cntrct_funnel_(mtd_target)_sc] = TOTALMTD(SUM(FCT_CRM_TARGET_M[target_cnt]), common_tp_nm='계약')
                 ※ SC별 전개 표이므로 항상 SC(CRM)목표 사용 (딜러목표 분기는 SC 미선택 카드용)
     · 계약진행률 = DIVIDE(계약값, 계약목표, 0)
     · 출고값   [4. sales_mtd(_coalesce)] = SUM(FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[cnt]) WHERE
                 (cancel_dt > EOMONTH(last_retail_sales_dt) OR cancel_dt IS NULL)  -- 취소 안 됨
                 AND last_retail_sales_dt ∈ [그 달 1일 ~ 말일]                      -- 그 달 실판매
     · 출고목표 [4. sales_mtd_(target)_sc/coalesce] = TOTALMTD(SUM(FCT_CRM_TARGET_M[target_cnt]),
                 target_grp_nm='Main' AND tp_grp_1='판매목표 대수')
     · 출고진행률 = DIVIDE(출고값, 출고목표, 0)
   ■ SC 선택 : @sc_name (특정 SC). NULL이면 제외·슬라이서 통과 전체 SC (1명당 1행).
   ■ 제외(3) : 창구SC / 고객지원팀·TOYOTA YM / user_id 목록
   ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── 게이지 기간 (연/월 → 그 달 전체) ── */
DECLARE @year  INT = 2026;
DECLARE @month INT = 4;
DECLARE @mon_start DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@year,@month,1);
DECLARE @ref_date  DATE = EOMONTH(@mon_start);        -- 그 달 말일 = 월 전체
/* ── 요약용 추가 기간 ── */
DECLARE @m1_start  DATE = DATEADD(DAY,1,EOMONTH(@mon_start,-2));  -- 전월 1일
DECLARE @m2_start  DATE = DATEADD(DAY,1,EOMONTH(@mon_start,-3));  -- 전전월 1일
DECLARE @nps_start DATE = DATEADD(DAY,1,EOMONTH(@mon_start,-4));  -- NPS: 전전전월 1일 (기준월 제외 직전3개월)
DECLARE @nps_end   DATE = EOMONTH(@mon_start,-1);                 -- NPS: 전월 말일
/* ── 프로필 기준일 : 오늘 (근속·나이용, 연·월과 무관) ── */
DECLARE @today DATE = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);

/* ── 슬라이서 (NULL=모두, 콤마 다중) ── */
DECLARE @brand       NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @dealer_nm   NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @group_name  NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @dept_nm     NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @active_yn   NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'재직';
DECLARE @sc_name     NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'강원모';

/* ── 제외 규칙 ── */
DECLARE @exclude_facade NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @exclude_dept   NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @exclude_users  NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

;WITH
/* ── 슬라이서·제외 통과 SC (계층 컬럼 + 프로필 원본) ── */
elig_user AS (
    SELECT u.sc_key, u.BRAND AS brand_nm, dlr.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm,
           u.[name] AS sc_name, u.birth_dt, u.work_start_dt
    FROM   ktws.DIM_MNG_USER u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER dlr ON u.dealer_key = dlr.dealer_key
    WHERE  ISNULL(u.facade_sc_yn,N'') <> @exclude_facade
      AND (@brand      IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@brand,     N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.BRAND))
      AND (@dealer_nm  IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dealer_nm, N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = dlr.dealer_nm))
      AND (@group_name IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@group_name,N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.group_name))
      AND (@dept_nm    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dept_nm,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.dept_nm))
      AND (@active_yn  IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@active_yn, N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.active_yn))
      AND (@sc_name    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@sc_name,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.name))
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_dept,',')  s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.dept_nm)
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_users,',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.user_id)
),

/* ── 계약 값 : SC별 FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS[cnt] 그 달 합 ── */
cntrct_val AS (
    SELECT c.cn_sc_key AS sc_key, SUM(c.cnt) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS c
    WHERE c.contract_dt >= @mon_start AND c.contract_dt <= @ref_date
    GROUP BY c.cn_sc_key
),

/* ── 출고 값 : SC별, last_retail_sales_dt 가 그 달 범위 + 취소 안 됨 ── */
sales_val AS (
    SELECT c.cn_sc_key AS sc_key, SUM(c.cnt) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS c
    WHERE c.last_retail_sales_dt >= @mon_start
      AND c.last_retail_sales_dt <= @ref_date
      AND ( c.cancel_dt IS NULL OR c.cancel_dt > EOMONTH(c.last_retail_sales_dt,0) )
    GROUP BY c.cn_sc_key
),

/* ── 계약 목표(SC) : FCT_CRM_TARGET_M, common_tp_nm='계약', 그 달 합 ── */
cntrct_tgt AS (
    SELECT f.sc_key, SUM(f.target_cnt) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M f
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS cal ON f.monthly_dt = cal.[Date]
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE t ON f.tp_key = t.tp_key
    WHERE t.common_tp_nm = N'계약'
      AND cal.[Date] >= @mon_start AND cal.[Date] <= @ref_date
    GROUP BY f.sc_key
),

/* ── 출고 목표(SC) : FCT_CRM_TARGET_M, target_grp_nm='Main' AND tp_grp_1='판매목표 대수', 그 달 합 ── */
sales_tgt AS (
    SELECT f.sc_key, SUM(f.target_cnt) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M f
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS cal ON f.monthly_dt = cal.[Date]
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE t ON f.tp_key = t.tp_key
    WHERE t.target_grp_nm = N'Main' AND t.tp_grp_1 = N'판매목표 대수'
      AND cal.[Date] >= @mon_start AND cal.[Date] <= @ref_date
    GROUP BY f.sc_key
),

/* ── 고객 수 : DISTINCT cust_seq (SC 연결 = mng_sc_key) ── */
cust AS (
    SELECT m.mng_sc_key AS sc_key, COUNT(DISTINCT m.cust_seq) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_MNG_CUST_LIST m
    JOIN elig_user eu ON m.mng_sc_key = eu.sc_key
    GROUP BY m.mng_sc_key
),

/* ── HOT 영업기회 : potential='HOT', 그달 등록 + 열린 리드(close_dt>기준일 or NULL) ── */
lead_hot AS (
    SELECT l.cl_sc_key AS sc_key, SUM(l.cnt) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD l
    JOIN elig_user eu ON l.cl_sc_key = eu.sc_key
    WHERE l.lead_reg_dt >= @mon_start AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @ref_date
      AND l.potential = N'HOT'
      AND (l.close_dt > @ref_date OR l.close_dt IS NULL)
    GROUP BY l.cl_sc_key
),

/* ── 전체 영업기회 : 그달 등록 + (열림 or 판매됨) ── */
lead_all AS (
    SELECT l.cl_sc_key AS sc_key, SUM(l.cnt) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD l
    JOIN elig_user eu ON l.cl_sc_key = eu.sc_key
    WHERE l.lead_reg_dt >= @mon_start AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @ref_date
      AND ( l.close_dt > @ref_date OR l.close_dt IS NULL OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )
    GROUP BY l.cl_sc_key
),

/* ── 기회창출 영업기회 평균(3개월, 당월+전월+전전월) ÷3 ── */
lead_avg3m AS (
    SELECT l.cl_sc_key AS sc_key,
        /* 각 달 = 그 달 등록 + 그 달말 기준 열린 리드, tp_grp_1='기회창출' */
        CAST(
          SUM(CASE WHEN l.lead_reg_dt >= @mon_start AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @ref_date
                    AND (l.close_dt > @ref_date OR l.close_dt IS NULL) THEN l.cnt ELSE 0 END)
        + SUM(CASE WHEN l.lead_reg_dt >= @m1_start AND l.lead_reg_dt <= EOMONTH(@mon_start,-1)
                    AND (l.close_dt > EOMONTH(@mon_start,-1) OR l.close_dt IS NULL) THEN l.cnt ELSE 0 END)
        + SUM(CASE WHEN l.lead_reg_dt >= @m2_start AND l.lead_reg_dt <= EOMONTH(@mon_start,-2)
                    AND (l.close_dt > EOMONTH(@mon_start,-2) OR l.close_dt IS NULL) THEN l.cnt ELSE 0 END)
          AS FLOAT) / 3.0 AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD l
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE t ON l.tp_key = t.tp_key
    JOIN elig_user eu ON l.cl_sc_key = eu.sc_key
    WHERE t.tp_grp_1 = N'기회창출'
      AND l.lead_reg_dt >= @m2_start AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @ref_date
    GROUP BY l.cl_sc_key
),

/* ── NPS 3개월 평균 : reply_date 가 직전3개월(기준월 제외) 인 promoter_score 평균 ── */
nps AS (
    SELECT n.sc_key, AVG(CAST(n.promoter_score AS FLOAT)) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_NPS n
    JOIN elig_user eu ON n.sc_key = eu.sc_key
    WHERE n.reply_date >= @nps_start AND n.reply_date <= @nps_end
    GROUP BY n.sc_key
)

/* ── 최종 : 프로필(오늘 기준) + 계약/출고(그 달) + 요약 ── */
SELECT
    eu.brand_nm    AS [브랜드],
    eu.dealer_nm   AS [딜러],
    eu.group_name  AS [전시장],
    eu.dept_nm     AS [팀],
    eu.sc_name     AS [SC],
    ISNULL(eu.dept_nm, N'')  AS [소속팀],
    /* 근속년수 : 오늘 기준 만 근속. 없으면 0 */
    CAST(CASE
        WHEN eu.work_start_dt IS NULL THEN 0
        WHEN (MONTH(@today) > MONTH(eu.work_start_dt))
          OR (MONTH(@today) = MONTH(eu.work_start_dt) AND DAY(@today) >= DAY(eu.work_start_dt))
            THEN YEAR(@today) - YEAR(eu.work_start_dt)
        ELSE YEAR(@today) - YEAR(eu.work_start_dt) - 1
    END AS INT)  AS [근속년수],
    /* 나이 : 연도차. 없으면 공백 */
    CASE WHEN eu.birth_dt IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE YEAR(@today) - YEAR(eu.birth_dt) END AS [나이],

    /* 계약 : 값 / 목표 / 진행률 */
    CAST(ISNULL(cv.v,0) AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS [계약],
    CAST(ISNULL(ct.v,0) AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS [계약목표],
    CAST(CASE WHEN ISNULL(ct.v,0)=0 THEN 0 ELSE ISNULL(cv.v,0)*1.0/ct.v END AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS [계약진행률],

    /* 출고 : 값 / 목표 / 진행률 */
    CAST(ISNULL(sv.v,0) AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS [출고],
    CAST(ISNULL(st.v,0) AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS [출고목표],
    CAST(CASE WHEN ISNULL(st.v,0)=0 THEN 0 ELSE ISNULL(sv.v,0)*1.0/st.v END AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS [출고진행률],

    /* 요약 */
    CAST(ISNULL(cu.v,0)  AS INT)          AS [고객수],
    CAST(ISNULL(lh.v,0)  AS INT)          AS [HOT영업기회],
    CAST(ISNULL(la.v,0)  AS INT)          AS [전체영업기회],
    CAST(ISNULL(a3.v,0)  AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS [기회창출영업기회_3개월평균],
    CAST(np.v AS DECIMAL(18,1))           AS [NPS]      -- 응답 없으면 NULL
FROM elig_user eu
LEFT JOIN cntrct_val cv ON cv.sc_key = eu.sc_key
LEFT JOIN sales_val  sv ON sv.sc_key = eu.sc_key
LEFT JOIN cntrct_tgt ct ON ct.sc_key = eu.sc_key
LEFT JOIN sales_tgt  st ON st.sc_key = eu.sc_key
LEFT JOIN cust       cu ON cu.sc_key = eu.sc_key
LEFT JOIN lead_hot   lh ON lh.sc_key = eu.sc_key
LEFT JOIN lead_all   la ON la.sc_key = eu.sc_key
LEFT JOIN lead_avg3m a3 ON a3.sc_key = eu.sc_key
LEFT JOIN nps        np ON np.sc_key = eu.sc_key
ORDER BY eu.brand_nm, eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.sc_name;

dax_expression: 1. act_mtd_(target)_preOp = TOTALMTD(CALCULATE(SUM('ktws FCT_CRM_TARGET_D'[target_cnt]), FILTER('ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER', 'ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER'[tp_grp_1] in {"관계형성", "기회창출"})),'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])

1. act_mtd_(ac)_preOp = 
TOTALMTD(
    CALCULATE(SUM('ktws FCT_ACTIVITY_v2'[actual_cnt]),
        FILTER('ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE', 'ktws DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE'[tp_grp_1] in {"관계형성", "기회창출"})),
    'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date])
1. progress_act_mtd_preOp = DIVIDE([1. act_mtd_(ac)_preOp], [1. act_mtd_(target)_preOp], 1)

count_working_day_pass = CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'),
    FILTER(
        'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS',
        'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[Date] <= TODAY()
            && 'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[kr_holiday] = "0"
    )
)
count_working_day_total = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'), 'ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS'[kr_holiday] = "0")
progress_working_day = DIVIDE([count_working_day_pass], [count_working_day_total], 0)

visual_name:
딜러별 / 전시장별 / 부서별 / SC별 / 영업유형별
활동 일별 진행현황

raw_columns.gold_query_variant__GOLD쿼리:
/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   [일별 활동 진행 현황] 활동유형분류>활동유형 × (활동목표 / 일일 활동 실적 / 일일 잔여 타겟)
   ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   컬럼 : 활동유형분류(tp_grp_1) / 활동유형(common_tp_nm)
          / 활동목표(act_target) / 일일활동실적(act_daily) / 일일잔여타겟(target_remains)
   축   : DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE 의 tp_grp_1, common_tp_nm 로 그룹.
          (DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER 는 common_tp_nm당 여러 행이라 조인 시 목표가 뻥튀기 → 사용 안 함)

   ■ DAX 이식 :
     · 일일활동실적 [1. act_daily]
         = SUM(FCT_ACTIVITY_v2[cnt])  WHERE act_result NOT IN('부재중') AND contact_tp<>'MSG'
     · 일일잔여타겟 [1. act_daily_(target_remains)]
         = IF( [act_daily_(target)] - [act_daily] < 0, 0, 차이 )   -- 음수는 0
     · 활동목표 [1. act_daily_(target)] = SUM(FCT_CRM_TARGET_D[target_cnt])  (날짜=실적과 동일 컨텍스트)

   ■ 실적·목표 기간 : 두 measure 모두 plain SUM → 같은 날짜 컨텍스트 공유.
        @date_from ~ @date_to 로 통일. 기본 = 단일일(선택일). 연도/월/일 등호슬라이서 = 하루.
        MTD(1일~선택일) 누적으로 보려면 @date_from 을 @mon_start 로만 바꾸면 됨.
   ■ 슬라이서 : 브랜드/딜러/전시장/팀/재직/SC + 활동유형/활동유형분류 추가슬라이서(포함, NULL=모두)
   ■ 고정 제외(시각적개체 필터, != ) :
        common_tp_nm != 견적,관계형성 소개,시승결과,시승예약,신차상담,시승완료
        tp_grp_1     != (공백),연락,판매목표 대수,활동기준 대수
   ■ 제외(공통) : 창구SC / 고객지원팀·TOYOTA YM / user_id 목록
   ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── 기간 (연도/월/일 슬라이서 → 그대로 매핑) ── */
DECLARE @year  INT = 2025;
DECLARE @month INT = 12;
DECLARE @day   INT = 27;     -- 일 슬라이서

DECLARE @mon_start DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@year,@month,1);
DECLARE @eom       DATE = EOMONTH(@mon_start);
DECLARE @ref_raw   DATE = DATEADD(DAY,@day-1,@mon_start);
DECLARE @ref_date  DATE = CASE WHEN @ref_raw > @eom THEN @eom ELSE @ref_raw END;  -- 말일 초과 방지

/* ── 실적·목표 공통 기간 : 두 measure 모두 plain SUM → 같은 날짜 컨텍스트 공유 ──
      기본 = 단일일(선택일).  MTD(1일~선택일) 누적으로 보려면 @date_from 을 @mon_start 로 변경. */
DECLARE @date_from DATE = @ref_date;    -- 단일일(선택일) 기준. MTD 누적으로 보려면 @mon_start
DECLARE @date_to   DATE = @ref_date;

/* ── 슬라이서 (NULL=모두, 콤마 다중). 스크린샷은 전부 '모두' ── */
DECLARE @brand       NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @dealer_nm   NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @group_name  NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @dept_nm     NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @active_yn   NVARCHAR(MAX) = '재직';
DECLARE @sc_name     NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
DECLARE @common_tp   NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;      -- 활동유형 추가 슬라이서(포함, NULL=모두)
DECLARE @tp_grp_1    NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;      -- 활동유형분류 추가 슬라이서(포함, NULL=모두)

/* ── 시각적개체 고정 제외 (common_tp_nm != / tp_grp_1 !=) ── */
DECLARE @exclude_common_tp NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'견적,관계형성 소개,시승결과,시승예약,신차상담,시승완료';
DECLARE @exclude_tp_grp    NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'연락,판매목표 대수,활동기준 대수';  -- + (공백)/NULL 도 제외

/* ── 제외 규칙 ── */
DECLARE @exclude_facade NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @exclude_dept   NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @exclude_users  NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

;WITH
/* ── 슬라이서·제외 통과 SC ── */
elig_user AS (
    SELECT u.sc_key
    FROM   ktws.DIM_MNG_USER u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER dlr ON u.dealer_key = dlr.dealer_key
    WHERE  ISNULL(u.facade_sc_yn,N'') <> @exclude_facade
      AND (@brand      IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@brand,     N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.BRAND))
      AND (@dealer_nm  IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dealer_nm, N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = dlr.dealer_nm))
      AND (@group_name IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@group_name,N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.group_name))
      AND (@dept_nm    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dept_nm,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.dept_nm))
      AND (@active_yn  IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@active_yn, N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.active_yn))
      AND (@sc_name    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@sc_name,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.name))
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_dept,',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.dept_nm)
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_users,',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.user_id)
),

/* ── 일일 활동 실적 : @date_from ~ @date_to 활동합 ── */
act_actual AS (
    SELECT t.tp_grp_1, t.common_tp_nm, SUM(a.cnt) AS act_daily
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 a
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE t ON a.tp_key = t.tp_key
    JOIN elig_user eu ON a.sc_key = eu.sc_key
    WHERE a.act_dt_fr >= @date_from
      AND a.act_dt_fr <= @date_to
